programme.desc: The team searches for a missing boy who attends the summer camp where Lt. Tao's son works. Meanwhile, Captain Raydor makes a troubling suggestion to Brenda as she continues her audit of the Major Crimes Unit.

programme.desc: When the squad comes across a pile of bones, they fall into a web of connections as they find their victim has an unnerving past. Meanwhile, Rusty continues to pursue his investigation of the Alice case with the help of a new friend.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Targets of Opportunity
programme.desc: After an officer-involved shooting leaves two L.A. policemen dead, the Major Crimes unit must work with the Deputy Chief of the LAPD Special Operations Bureau, Fritz Howard, to piece together this high stakes case of disguise.

programme.desc: After Major Crimes identifies a murder victim as the son of State Superior Court judge known for being tough on criminals, the squad hunts through her current case load for clues. They find a case linked to an Aryan motorcycle gang and a missing boy.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Lovers: Deadly Double Life

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Lovers: Murderous Millionaire
programme.desc: After young mother and high-end escort Georgina Symonds goes missing, police discover one of her obsessed clients is responsible for her disappearance.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Constructive Critcism
programme.desc: When a man is found dead, having been stabbed 46 times, and police are stuck sifting through the DNA. After an arduous search, they find their killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Home Evasion

programme.title: Forensic Files: Invisible Intruder

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Killing Room

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ultimate Betrayal
programme.desc: Fire sweeps through a mansion, killing two children, all evidence leads to the mother.

programme.desc: A fire leads investigators to re-examine an unusual death.

programme.desc: When a Spaniard is sentenced to death for the murder of a young Florida couple, his family appeals to the international media to fight his conviction.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Amelia Earhart
programme.desc: Josh hunts down new evidence on the iconic disappearance of Amelia Earhart. He first treks to uncharted tribal lands of PNG, then ends his journey in Fiji hoping to uncover the human remains of Amelia.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: World's 8th Wonder
programme.desc: Josh is on the trail from Russia to Germany in search of history's most expensive stolen object, the Amber Chamber. Retracing the steps of Nazi soldiers, Josh explores abandoned Nazi bunkers and a hazardous German mine.

programme.desc: Josh Gates journeys to the Holy Land to learn the truth about where Jesus Christ was actually born. He finds experts and historians who use state-of-the-art technology to finally unravel this mystery, revealing that it may not have happened as we thought.

programme.title: Expedition X: Aliens of the Deep
programme.desc: Shocking, declassified video captured by the U.S. Navy triggers Jess and Phil's investigation into mysterious, supersonic craft flying above and racing below the waters off California's Catalina Island.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: The Sultan's Heart
programme.desc: Josh travels to Turkey and Hungary searching for the heart of a former ruler.

programme.desc: An abandoned eerie structure in France could have doomed the Allies in World War II, and new discoveries at this mysterious site reveal the truth behind top-secret Nazi plans to unleash apocalyptic destruction.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: Mystery of the Nazi Nukes
programme.desc: When a secret bunker and a vast network of tunnels are discovered after World War II, experts use cutting-edge tech to uncover if the high levels of radiation in the area could be connected to a classified Nazi nuclear program.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: Conspiracy on Death Island
programme.desc: A strange, abandoned mansion on a remote island is central to countless conspiracy theories, and new discoveries reveal if this eerie site was a secret Nazi base intended for a sinister mission.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: Hitler's Invisible City
programme.desc: As the Soviet Army pushes the Nazis out of Poland, they discover a massive city of over a thousand buildings that was unknown to the Allies, and using the latest science, experts reveal how Hitler was able to keep this sinister place hidden for so long.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Mountain Timber Frame
programme.desc: A man builds an off-grid timber frame cabin on his family's 100-acre property in upstate New York.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Bamboo House
programme.desc: Bamboo-home architect David Sands builds a getaway in Hawaii with a luxurious outdoor bath area and a detached, starlit master bedroom. But volcanic eruptions threaten to send the project in smoke.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Earth Block Ranch
programme.desc: A family builds thousands of earth blocks while withstanding winter monsoons, freezing temperatures and more to finish their San Antonio forever home.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Floating Castle
programme.desc: Marine scientists in Florida hire engineers Nicolas Derouin and Arnaud Luguet to create a first-of-its-kind floating home. They have nine months to complete it, but unpredictable weather and building hiccups may sink this project before it can swim.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Tropical Paradise
programme.desc: A couple plans to build an oceanfront oasis for their family on the slopes of Maui, Hawaii. To keep the budget low, they design a Quonset hut which can be built cheaply and quickly, but unexpected setbacks test their limits at every turn.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Piney Woods Place
programme.desc: Cat Taylor constructs a remote sanctuary for her and her husband in the woods of Northwest Texas. The two-story home is made from sand, clay and straw.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Streamside Cottage
programme.desc: Professional treehouse builder Michael 'Murph' Murphy wants to build a cottage retreat for his family in Washington. He enlists his friends to create a natural siding and a massive fishing net for lounging above the living space.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Passive River House
programme.desc: A pro builder constructs an off-grid dream home for his family on a remote riverside plot of land in the heart of Canada's east coast. He faces tropical storms, winter blizzards and more all while using innovative methods to meet passive house standards.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Sarah's Story

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Kirsten's Story

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Q-Pay
programme.desc: Find out which joker has a weak spot for animals that the other guys love to exploit, who made the best wingman back in his single days and how long it took Q to grow out his hair long enough for a wig.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Up Loser's Creek
programme.desc: Find out which Joker ran for Congress as a write-in candidate, which joker was a top-notch salesman before starting the show and who had a job in finance.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Rubbed the Wrong Way
programme.desc: Find out why the food court was picked for the 'stalk and text' challenge, what classic comedy inspired 'over the shoulder,' and who was lucky enough to test out the flying contraption for Joe the Genie.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Baggage Shame
programme.desc: Find out how Murr's old neighbour learns a little TMI about his personal life and which of the jokers Joe would want by his side in a fight.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Flatfoot the Pirate
programme.desc: Who made the call to give Murr a face full of slushie at the mall? How did the Jokers keep their props secret from each other before Laugh Man Standing? And whose breast milk did Pirate Sal chug?

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Remember the Pact
programme.desc: Find out how many mousetraps accidentally went off during Q's turn in 'hold this please,' what made Joe and Murr join 'team skins' in Columbus park, and how Murr's tech punishment made show history.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Spider Man
programme.desc: Find out which of the jokers is the handiest, who hates the taste of beer, and how Q's love of animals beat out his arachnophobia and made for a better punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Silence of the Lame

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Sucks for You

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Off the Reservation

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Antisocial Network

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Mime and Punishment
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q put the nasty in namaste when they lead guided meditations. Tonight's big loser gets boxed in with a 24-hour punishment.

programme.desc: After months in isolation, the friends glam it up for a Beverly Hills 'barbecue' at Dorit’s house. Kyle’s sister, Kathy Hilton, introduces the group to Crystal Minkoff, wife of Hollywood director Rob Minkoff.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills: Secrets Revealed
programme.desc: The story behind Denise's 'Bravo, Bravo, ****ing Bravo' moment. Dorit faces mediation for her highly publicized lawsuit. Garcelle's new house is threatened by wild fires. Meanwhile, Liza checks out a swanky Hollywood apartment with her daughter Amelia.

programme.title: The Kelly Clarkson Show

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York: Bids and Brawls
programme.desc: Ryan's boss needs a broker, and he thinks Ryan is just the guy to sell his apartment along with the 400-piece art collection he recently bought. Fredrik scores the biggest single-unit listing of his career. Luis plays referee between a buyer and seller.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York: Three Brokers and a Baby
programme.desc: Fredrik targets Chinese buyers in an attempt to sell a $35 million listing in the prestigious Time Warner Center, but despite his best efforts, he’s coming up against a great wall. Old friends come knocking with a new listing in Harlem.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York: Frenemies Unite
programme.desc: The ‘Twin Towers’ of real estate stand united for the first time as Fredrik invites Ryan to co-list a new penthouse in Chelsea. Fredrik is ready to be fast friends, but Ryan is skeptical enough to keep other irons in the fire.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York: Walking on Eggshells
programme.desc: Fredrik and Ryan's chummy relationship is tested, both personally and professionally as Fredrik and his husband, Derek, surprise Ryan's fiancée, Emilia, with a provocative request as business complications threaten to derail Fred and Ryan's co-list.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York: Unfinished Business
programme.desc: Fredrik's reputation and $22.5-million price point are on the line when his developers threaten to back out of the premium finishes they promised. On his latest project, Ryan is reunited with a familiar blonde.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York: I Love You, Puffer Munkin

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York: Don't Count Your Eggs ...

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York: Dude, Where's My Broker?

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York: Luis 2.0

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York: The Final Shakedown

programme.desc: Follow veterinarian Dr. Jan Pol as he treats animals at his clinic in rural Michigan.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Dr. Strangeglove
programme.desc: The staff of Pol Vet Services has one head scratcher after another, from the peculiar to the downright bizarre. With over 19,000 clients, it's only a matter of time before the vets are presented with a unique case that they've never seen before.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Cowhide and Seek
programme.desc: Runaways, adventurists, and escape artists, the Pol's have their hands full, between bulls on the loose, and an attempted kitten getaway.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Dr. Fix-It-All
programme.desc: Clients take matters into their own hands and our vets have a slew of do-it-yourself doctoring to repair. As if they're not busy enough at the clinic, Dr. Pol, Diane and Charles embark on some ambitious home improvement projects at the lake house.

programme.title: Critter Fixers: Country Vets: The Tortoise and the Hair…less Cat
programme.desc: Drs. Hodges and Ferguson work to save a bunny that has been attacked by the family cat.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Secrets of the Asteroids
programme.desc: One of NASA's most ambitious missions is investigating an asteroid in more detail than ever before, revealing how space rocks can kick-start life on other planets and how they could possibly hold answers to the secrets of the Solar System.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Space's Great Wall
programme.desc: Astronomers make an extraordinary discovery when they uncover a cosmic mega-structure that's one billion light years long, and now investigators race to decode the hidden forces that shape the most massive and mysterious structure known in the Universe.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Bermuda Triangle of Space
programme.desc: Astronauts have detected a mysterious region of space that's dangerous for reasons they have yet to understand, and scientists believe the long-term effects of this danger zone may have implications for the future of humanity both in space and on Earth.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Universe: Our Solar System: The Asteroid Mysteries
programme.desc: The Solar System is home to a vast array of asteroids and comets, and experts examine them to search for the origins of the universe.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Birth of the Monster Black Holes
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal an astonishing supermassive black hole that was born during the earliest days of the cosmos, and finding out how this giant grew so large so quickly may help to explain the very formation of the universe itself.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Secrets of the Hubble
programme.desc: A secret history of life-or-death missions has been concealed to keep the Hubble Space Telescope working since its launch. Now, NASA astronauts reveal the truth behind how this complex machine continues to make astonishing new discoveries.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Birth of the Monster Black Holes
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal an astonishing supermassive black hole that was born during the earliest days of the cosmos, and finding out how this giant grew so large so quickly may help to explain the very formation of the universe itself.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Secrets of the Hubble
programme.desc: A secret history of life-or-death missions has been concealed to keep the Hubble Space Telescope working since its launch. Now, NASA astronauts reveal the truth behind how this complex machine continues to make astonishing new discoveries.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Universe: Our Solar System: The Asteroid Mysteries
programme.desc: The Solar System is home to a vast array of asteroids and comets, and experts examine them to search for the origins of the universe.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: House of Horror
programme.desc: An eerie set of buildings in Paris is evidence of an unspeakable evil. New discoveries reveal the horrific things that happened here, and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Real Shawshank
programme.desc: An eerie prison with a dark past that became the setting of an iconic Hollywood movie and alien monoliths on a strange and remote island are deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: American Ghost Park
programme.desc: Deep in the wilderness of the American south, a long-abandoned amusement park is home to secrets of a forgotten, imaginary world. When experts investigate, they reveal why this bizarre place was built and what caused its downfall.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Florida Doomsday Castle
programme.desc: A strange bunker near the Kennedy Space Center once served a top-secret military function should doomsday ever come to the Sunshine State. Experts use declassified intel to reveal the sinister purpose of this forbidding facility and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Towers of Blood
programme.desc: Abandoned towers in southern Greece are the ruins of a fearsome warrior civilization descended from the Spartans, and new discoveries reveal the role these towers played during generations of violent blood feuds among the clans that lived here.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Factory of Death
programme.desc: A deserted facility in the remote countryside features mysterious graffiti that may be highly advanced mathematical equations pointing to a dark secret; experts investigate this classified military wasteland with a deadly past.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Labyrinth of the Dead
programme.desc: Tunnels filled with human bones lie beneath the streets of Paris, and this horrifying engineering marvel points to a dark secret. New discoveries reveal why this grisly underground death maze was built, and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: World's Strangest Ghost Towns
programme.desc: The world's strangest ghost towns are home to dark secrets, creepy buildings, and eerie sights, and new discoveries reveal why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Anarchy on Ireland's Alcatraz
programme.desc: The ruins of an abandoned prison are evidence of a chaotic riot that put the prisoners in charge. Special access to its burnt-out interior reveals how inmates took over Ireland's Alcatraz and why it is deserted today.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The World's Strangest Disaster Zones
programme.desc: A deserted city half buried, whole villages swallowed by the earth, temples turned to rubble, and an arctic town facing a deadly threat. Within these structures are the echoes of history; each haunted shell now ready to tell its own story.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Thing on Hell Mountain
programme.desc: A massive, alien-like fortress built into a mountainside is the central node to a network of pipelines that race outwards like tentacles; behind-the-scenes access reveals the secrets of why this strange complex was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Valley of the Damned: The Jehovah Jinx
programme.desc: Jehovah's Witness Pam Candelario is murdered during a home invasion and her husband Ralph is brutally beaten. But what appears to be a home invasion soon turns into one of the most bizarre murder cases that police have ever encountered.

programme.title: The Night That Didn't End: Night on the Parkway
programme.desc: In the great smoky mountains of North Carolina, Billy Carter raises his daughters Crystal and Misty. When a body is found on the scenic Blue Ridge Parkway, this family's piece of paradise becomes a nightmare they relive again and again.

programme.title: Diabolical: Masking Evil
programme.desc: A burning car is found by the side of a highway on the same night a single mother of two is reported missing. These two events are connected, and connecting the dots will lead investigators to a notorious criminal who has been hiding in plain sight.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: I'd Kill Them Again
programme.desc: Columbus, Georgia, police are blindsided by a triple homicide that rocks the foundation of this small community just south of Atlanta. An unlikely source provides investigators with the lead they need, resulting in a series of shocking arrests.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Footprints in the Snow
programme.desc: The community in Bozeman, Montana, is rocked when officers find Lauren DeWise deceased and her roommate, Ashley Van Hemert, critically injured. As police search for clues, they realize that they must dive deep into Lauren's life to find her killer.

programme.title: See No Evil: Back to Reality
programme.desc: In Buena Park, California, a suitcase containing a mutilated body is discovered in a dumpster. The victim is identified as Jasmine Fiore, a 28-year-old model who has been reported missing. Police turn to surveillance video, hoping to identify her killer.

programme.title: See No Evil: Gold Pontiac
programme.desc: When roommates Amanda Douglas and Jennifer Sudar Sanders are gunned down in broad daylight, police suspect a personal motive. Detectives hunt for surveillance video of the womens' final hours, hoping it will reveal the clues they need to catch a killer.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Footprints in the Snow
programme.desc: The community in Bozeman, Montana, is rocked when officers find Lauren DeWise deceased and her roommate, Ashley Van Hemert, critically injured. As police search for clues, they realize that they must dive deep into Lauren's life to find her killer.

programme.title: See No Evil: Back to Reality
programme.desc: In Buena Park, California, a suitcase containing a mutilated body is discovered in a dumpster. The victim is identified as Jasmine Fiore, a 28-year-old model who has been reported missing. Police turn to surveillance video, hoping to identify her killer.

programme.title: See No Evil: The Landlady
programme.desc: The brutal murder of an elderly landlady offers no forensic answers. Detectives piece together security footage, and a motive to find their killer.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Jane Doe
programme.desc: Judith Therianos is a free-spirit; someone who very much wants to see the good in everyone. But Florida detectives unearth video surveillance that shows her utterly alone and blissfully unaware of the danger just moments before her life is cut short.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Reduced to Ash
programme.desc: Julie and Keith's relationship stands the test of time. But after thirty-five years together, a profound restlessness seeps into their union's foundation. As these lifelong partners pursue very private adventures, their once fiery love is reduced to ash.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Love in Flames
programme.desc: Family tragedies send a couple's dream of a perfect life up in flames.

programme.title: Bride Killa: The Ultimate Pledge
programme.desc: New Year’s Eve 2014 a holiday full of anger destroys a young Ohio couple when one is charged with the other's murder. But this marriage is not a story of deceit and betrayal but rather a cautionary tale of how a volatile relationship can develop.

programme.title: Love Kills: We Were Like Fire
programme.desc: When Judy and Duane meet, they both long for excitement and to escape the lives they live. Turns out, fate as more in store for them than they desire.

programme.title: Love Kills: Us Against the World
programme.desc: Fate in the form of a framed picture brings Lori and Mike together. Mike's been in prison and wants to start over. When he meets Lori, he wants to take care of her. But when he can't get a job, he goes to the dark side again, taking Lori with him.

programme.title: Diabolical: Who Needs Enemies
programme.desc: A cold morning in December starts off like any other until a rural farmer discovers the body of a dead woman. What seems like a sadistic rape and murder turns into a conspiracy and before long the diabolical nature of someone close is revealed.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: Beauty in the Bronx
programme.desc: Evimer, a beautiful young woman afraid of love, meets a handsome stranger who she soon falls deeply for. But his charm turns to violent jealousy and Ramon becomes convinced that if he cannot have Evie, nobody can.

programme.title: Web of Lies: The Candyman
programme.desc: Candy Williams has recently moved to the idyllic beach town of Gulfport, Florida. When she a meets handsome stranger at the beach, she thinks life can't get any better. But a fantasy romance becomes a real life horror story as his past comes to life.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Live to Tell: Surviving Ted Bundy
programme.desc: Three women who were attacked by the notorious serial killer Ted Bundy reveal their terrifying stories of that night, and their healing and hope.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: He's Out There
programme.desc: Florida teen Karen Slattery is enjoying a night babysitting her neighbors' children, until a violent intruder bursts into the home and vanishes with no trace. With the community on edge, police know they don't have much time before he strikes again.

programme.title: Surviving Evil: The Queen's Daughter
programme.desc: A young woman is plunged into the dark side of Detroit when a night on the town leaves her stranded on the freeway and in the clutches of an armed gang of thugs on a violent crime spree.

programme.title: Disappeared: Just Out of Sight
programme.desc: When Michael VanZandt, a veteran and father of three, disappears one night in Hermosa Beach, Ca., police suspect a group of strangers may be involved. But his loved ones are haunted by suspicions about his thrill seeking when considering his fate.

programme.title: Dead Silent: The Red River
programme.desc: After Allison Walker mysteriously goes missing just days before Christmas, investigators scour her pig farm in Adairville, Kentucky in search of clues. They quickly discover that the deep, dark secret to her whereabouts lies within her own family.

programme.title: Weaponology: Body Armor
programme.desc: Follow the history of armour protection from medieval knights to the latest revolutionary invention called dragon skin. Find out how a priest invented the first bulletproof vest, and how a pizza boy came up with concealable body armour.

programme.title: Weaponology: Fighter
programme.desc: Exploring the development of engine power, wings, maneuverability and ejection systems, find out how fighter jets now rule the land and sky.

programme.title: Weaponology: Fire Weapons
programme.desc: Witness how fire has become a terrifying weapon of mass destruction, burning hotter, harder and longer - from the simple Molotov cocktail to the awesome destructive power of today's thermo baric bombs.

programme.title: Ultimate Weapons: Robotic Warriors
programme.desc: Robotic Warriors are futuristic unmanned war machines that can even think for themselves. These intelligent weapon systems combine stealth and autonomy with the power to strike and destroy their targets.

programme.title: Ultimate Weapons: Sniper Rifles
programme.desc: Maximum reach makes the Sniper Rifle an Ultimate Weapon. With the accuracy and stopping power to take out small targets a mile away, the military sniper can put demands on the weapon that will achieve amazing results.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Okinawa: Island Fortress
programme.desc: US troops come up against 120,000 Japanese soldiers on the island of Okinawa. Fighting through mountainous terrain and in treacherous conditions, American forces triumph and pave the way for the end of World War Two.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Courage at Sea
programme.desc: The biggest naval battle in history will be decided when a small group of under-armed, ill-prepared US ships find themselves in a chaotic and ferocious fight against the largest battleships ever built.

programme.title: Ultimate Weapons: Sniper Rifles
programme.desc: Maximum reach makes the Sniper Rifle an Ultimate Weapon. With the accuracy and stopping power to take out small targets a mile away, the military sniper can put demands on the weapon that will achieve amazing results.

programme.desc: US troops come up against 120,000 Japanese soldiers on the island of Okinawa. Fighting through mountainous terrain and in treacherous conditions, American forces triumph and pave the way for the end of World War Two.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Courage at Sea

programme.title: Weaponology: Fire Weapons
programme.desc: Witness how fire has become a terrifying weapon of mass destruction, burning hotter, harder and longer - from the simple Molotov cocktail to the awesome destructive power of today's thermo baric bombs.

programme.title: Weaponology: Fighter
programme.desc: Exploring the development of engine power, wings, maneuverability and ejection systems, find out how fighter jets now rule the land and sky.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: The Pleasant Valley War
programme.desc: In the dangerous frontier of Arizona, two ranching families begin as friends, but become locked in an epic battle known as the Pleasant Valley War. It's the deadliest 'family' feud in U.S. history.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: The Johnson County War
programme.desc: In 1880's Wyoming, a feud explodes when ranching homesteaders like Nate Champion face off against cattle barons like Frank Wolcott, over land, power and the future of the American West.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: Hatfields and McCoys
programme.desc: The Hatfields (Devil Anse) versus the McCoys (Randall) is one of the most notorious feuds in American history. What starts as Civil War hostility rapidly escalates to kidnapping, illicit love affairs, murder, and a nation-wide turf war.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: The Royal Gorge War
programme.desc: When Leadville, Colorado strikes silver in the 1870's, the race is on between the Atchison, Topeka & Santa Fe Railway, and the Denver & Rio Grande Railroad, to be the first to lay tracks through the narrow Royal Gorge.

programme.title: Shadow Ops: Codeman: Trigon
programme.desc: Martha Peterson is a CIA secret weapon, operating as a woman in the man's world of espionage in Cold War Moscow. TRIGON is a KGB turncoat, ready to hand over top secret intelligence to bring down the Soviet Union from within.

programme.title: Shadow Ops: Reagan's Secret Weapon
programme.desc: Vladimir Vetrov was a top KGB spy until he betrayed his country and became a secret agent for the West. Codenamed 'Farewell' he would become America's single greatest asset in the US-Soviet spy war.

programme.title: Shadow Ops: Escape From Moscow
programme.desc: KGB Colonel turned double agent Oleg Gordievsky has spent ten years spying for Britain's secret service, MI6. Now the Soviets are on to him. His only hope for survival is to attempt a daring exfiltration plan.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Fury
programme.desc: On June 28, 1914, the assassination of an obscure Austrian archduke in Sarajevo triggers the most disastrous conflict the world has ever known. Germany becomes an enemy to France, invades Belgium and, in September, arrives at the gates of Paris.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Fear
programme.desc: The French Army stops the German advance at the battle of the Marne while the Germans halt the Russians at the Tannenberg on the eastern front.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Hell
programme.desc: War descends into hell. The battlefield becomes a slaughterhouse. After 16 months of fighting, five million men are dead. Despite this, neither side has gained any ground until a new and terrifying machine rolls onto the battlefield: the tank.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Rage
programme.desc: People have had enough of the war and uprisings are brewing. German submarine attacks provoke the Americans, but they arrive too late to prevent the Battle of Passchendaele.

programme.desc: A showcase of gourmet food for holiday entertaining or for gift giving.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Glasshouse Treehouse
programme.desc: Pete treks to New York's Catskill Mountains to build an NTS first - a glasshouse in the sky. Piecing materials together like a puzzle, Pete uses his clients' collection of 50 vintage windows to construct an elegant treehouse encased by walls of glass.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Nature's Super HQ
programme.desc: Pete and NTS give superhero efforts to build a treehouse for the For-Mar Nature Preserve just outside Flint, MI. The 5-platform 'nature headquarters' will serve as a positive addition to a community still reeling from the water crisis that began in 2014.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Hill Country Hideout
programme.desc: Pete and his gang ride out to the Lone Star State to build a double-decker hideout in Texas Hill Country. Six live oak trees are used to create rustic perfection with a saloon-style first floor for sippin' sarsaparilla and a glass floor for views below.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: Five Years Old
programme.desc: A five-year-old house needs major repairs and the builder won’t do anything to help. Mike Holmes and his team of pros step in to give the family the safe home they need and make up for the shortcomings of minimum code.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: Walk the Planks
programme.desc: When a couple decides to paint the second-storey deck on their nine-year-old home, it starts falling apart. Mike and his team discover that it’s rotted through and an accident waiting to happen.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: House Sandwich
programme.desc: Mike gets called to a house that’s flooding after two monster custom homes are built on either side. The homeowners want to blame the builders, but Mike reveals that the real solution lies closer to home.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: Investment Gate
programme.desc: Mike Holmes helps a couple pick up the pieces after getting conned out of $300,000 by a contractor friend who has conned millions from other families.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Pickle Mansion
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs head to Knoxville, Tennessee, in hopes of salvaging the crumbling Pickle Mansion. The main items of interest are a copper frieze and columns. Mike discovers a fuel drop tank and he and Tay build a dresser kitchen island.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: A Grand Exterior
programme.desc: Nicole makes a spur-of-the-moment bid and wins a house sight-unseen at auction. Nicole visits the six bedroom, three bath manor and falls in love with its historic details and rustic charm.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Powder Room With a Flair
programme.desc: Nicole knows that a ground floor powder room will see a ton of guests.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Grand Dining Room
programme.desc: Nicole tackles the dining room of her Tudor home using custom leaded glass and modern oak flooring.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Rebuild Below
programme.desc: A dark basement that could have easily been overlooked as an unsalvageable and unusable space is transformed into a gorgeous family room.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: A Grand Living Room
programme.desc: Nicole's newest home is 100 years old, and unsurprisingly the living room needs work from top to bottom. Despite major setbacks, Nicole is up for the challenge.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Kitchen Overhaul
programme.desc: When it comes to restoring kitchens, Nicole Curtis' rule is that it should look old and work like new. In her Grand Blvd. home, she has to work with a large kitchen that offers little wall space.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Leaky Bedroom Disaster
programme.desc: A fresh window seat, antique glass knobs, and a stairwell re-do get Nicole closer to finishing her grand 2nd floor.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Solarium Refresh
programme.desc: Once a boarded-up eyesore, Nicole's first-floor solarium has the potential to be the best room in the house.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Jack and Jill Suite
programme.desc: With the help of a 1920s mint condition porcelain sink, Nicole is able to transform the Jack and Jill bathroom in her Grand Boulevard home without sacrificing its antique integrity.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Rehab Attic
programme.desc: Nicole's 1913 mansion in the heart of Detroit is topped with an old, dusty attic that was once servant's quarters.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Hill Country Caribbean
programme.desc: After years of vacationing on the island of Roatan, a couple has decided to just build the Caribbean in their back yard. The team design a curvilinear pool with infinity edge, a sunken bar area, six water figures and a beach like they've ever built.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Million Dollar View Pool
programme.desc: The King family seeks help building their new palace in the sunny hills of California. The Pool Kings find themselves between a rock ledge and hard design while bringing this build to life on a sloped property.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Wildebeest and Waterfalls
programme.desc: Texas grandparents want a backyard and waterfall that is even more of an attraction for their grandkids than the exotic animals that live next door. The crew create an oversized fire pit, a dog-friendly Baja shelf and a boulder waterfall.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Cliffside Dreams
programme.desc: A couple with a crew of rambunctious kids and a dream house in San Antonio is in desperate need of a pool. The kings design an expansive pool with a Baja shelf, swim-up bar, giant infinity edge and massive two-storey deck to enjoy the view.

programme.title: Pool Kings: A Hawaiian Paradise Pool
programme.desc: Hawaii may be 3,000 miles away, but the kings are able to recreate the island paradise right outside this family's door. They turn the Ritters' old yard into a luxurious lagoon and give them a dreamy spot to make lots of new memories.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Three Tiers
programme.desc: A Texas couple building their dream home wants a pool with one-of-a-kind architecture that's also kid-friendly for their grandchildren.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Build the Pool and They Will Come
programme.desc: Grandparents want an irresistible pool to ensure the grandkids will want to spend plenty of time at their new place. Steve and Justin come through with a beautiful raised pool design featuring a huge deck that triples the entertaining space.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Mountain Lake Resort Pool
programme.desc: An active family in southern California wants an extravagant pool to remind them of their favorite lakeside vacations. The kings don't know which is bigger, their clients' wish list or the 20-foot jumping cliff they have to create from scratch.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Magnificent Mediterranean Pool
programme.desc: This pool is so extraordinary it takes over a year to build. From a 60-foot pool and a 14-foot spa to a hand-carved Italian marble fountain, the kinds pull out all the stops to give a family a piece of the Mediterranean.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Water, Water Everywhere
programme.desc: An active family in Austin, Texas, wants their own pool so they can spend time together outdoors at home and entertain their friends. Steve and Justin design a beautiful, feature-packed pool with copper scuppers and floating steps.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Stuffed, Spicy and Cheesy
programme.desc: In Queens, N.Y., Michael Symon gets in touch with his Greek heritage with a classic lamb and feta cheeseburger, and then he sinks his teeth into an Italian-style burger stuffed with smoky mozzarella and prosciutto.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Wild Smoke and Fiery Burgers
programme.desc: In Palm Springs, Calif., Michael Symon finds a spicy burger that ignites a four-alarm fire, and a chorizo-pineapple burger sings a perfect harmony of sweet and heat.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Gordita, Pray, Love
programme.desc: Noah Cappe hits the jackpot with midway eats, like the onion ring nacho supreme and cosmic funnel cake, at the Pasco County Fair in Florida. Later, he decks the halls and grabs a bite or two at the sights and sounds of Christmas in San Marcos, Texas.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Local Legends
programme.desc: From sandwiches to desserts, Noah discovers foods that put cities on the map and some that present an entire state.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Fight Club Sandwich
programme.desc: Noah Cappe meets his match with some knock-out fruity feasts at the Florida Strawberry Festival in Plant City. He starts the day with the strawberry French toast burger and slurps the way better strawberry shake.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Bite Club
programme.desc: Noah Cappe celebrates the arrival of spring in Winchester, Va., at the Shenandoah Apple Blossom Festival. He starts the day with the Cowboy Breakfast and ends it with Caramel Apple Tots.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Deliciously Doughy
programme.desc: Noah Cappe rolls across America with a list of deliciously doughy midway munchies that he 'kneads' to try. From the OMG Pretzel Bomb to the Pumpkin Pie Beignet, these treats are perfect for all the gluten gluttons and yeasty boys and girls.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Dude, Where's My Carb?

programme.title: Food Paradise: Mangia Meals
programme.desc: We're taking our tongues on a tour of Italy without leaving the States starting with a pizza in New York that's as large as the city's Italian population.

programme.title: Late Nite Eats: Vancouver
programme.desc: Jordan Andino's on the west coast, checking out what Vancouver has to offer after hours.

programme.title: Late Nite Eats: Pittsburgh
programme.desc: When the sun sets on Steeltown, Jordan Andino hits the streets to uncover unexpected late night delights in Pittsburgh. Jordan heads to The Yard in Shadyside where they're grilling up more than 29 different kinds of grilled cheese sandwiches.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Hidden Treasures
programme.desc: From classics with a twist to unexpected pairings, Roger Mooking finds fifteen of the most surprisingly delicious meals in America.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Appetizers
programme.desc: Roger Mooking starts the meal off right with 15 of the best appetizers in the United States. From nachos and chicken wings to oysters, fries and more, Roger's going coast-to-coast to find the best!

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Hamming it Up
programme.desc: Today is about Roger's favorite animal - the pig. He's hamming it up with some of the country's best suppliers or cured, smoked, and aged pork.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Mediterranean Seafood Fests
programme.desc: Roger heads to Northern California for two spectacular wood-fired Mediterranean seafood feasts.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: South Carolina Surf and Turf
programme.desc: Roger leaves the city of Charleston and heads out into the country for some whole hog barbecue and low-country oyster roasts.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Pigging Out On Pork
programme.desc: One of the great wonders of the barbecue world is smoked pork shoulder. It's a big hunk of meat cooked low and slow until succulent and tender. Roger's favorite way to devour this delicious thing of beauty is in a sandwich.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Old School, New School
programme.desc: Roger Mooking gets schooled by two pitmasters changing the barbecue game in Charleston, S.C. One has a pit room where whole hogs get cooked low and slow. The other makes Tex-Mex with smokes meats from a massive smoker.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Red-Hot Roasts
programme.desc: Roger visits two caterers in the South who specialize in live-fire cookouts. He starts in Chattanooga, Tennessee where Argentinian grill master Mariano Cebrián has an incredible collection of portable rigs to create fantastical live-fire events.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: 50 Shades of Crepe
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to Vancouver to sample some amazing eats, like the truly Canadian poutine stuffed burger, shrimp fried rice Balls, jerk chicken dumplings, and the Donuccino, a meal and a milkshake all in one.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Piefidelity
programme.desc: Noah Cappe knows where to find amazing fresh seafood at the Delaware State Fair in Harrington.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The Good, the Bacon, the Ugly

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Deep-Fried Frenzy
programme.desc: Nothing's better than a little batter and hot oil. Eddie Jackson tracks down the crunchiest, most-delectable deep-fried foods that will put any food lover in a total frenzy.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Cheat Day

programme.title: Bluey: Trains/ Queens/ Flat Pack
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo commute on the Dad-Train. Mum is crowned Queen with the girls as her butlers. Bluey and Bingo construct a mini-civilization.

programme.title: Dino Ranch: Tinhorn Trouble/ Family Comes First
programme.desc: Min learns you should always do the right thing when the Tinhorns trick the Dino Ranchers. Then, Jon learn the importance of family.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Luna's Cosmic Tantrum/ Motsuki The Best
programme.desc: Motsuki becomes Owelette's sidekick; Motsuki traps Luna Girl on the moon.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Slow Down, Catboy!
programme.desc: The Incredible Kid Cup is stolen, so the PJ Masks race against Night Ninja and Luna Girl to get it back. Catboy has to learn that slow and steady wins the race, or they'll lose the cup for good.

programme.title: Bluey: Favourite Thing / Daddy Dropoff / Sleepytime
programme.desc: The Heelers take turns remembering their favourite thing from the day. It’s Dad’s turn to give the kids breakfast and drop them off at school. Bingo promises to wake up in her own bed.

programme.title: Bluey: Pirates / Chickenrat /Neighbours
programme.desc: Bluey, Bingo and Missy pretend to be pirates; Bingo loses her favourite toy right before bedtime; Bluey builds a new pretend house.

programme.title: Doc McStuffins: Huggable Hallie/ Pop-Up Paulo
programme.desc: Hallie's computer chip falls out and Doc has to perform 'surgery' to put it back in. Donny's new toy pretends to be injured to get the other toys' attention, but when he actually twists one of his springs, no one believes he's actually hurt.

programme.title: Doc McStuffins: The Glider Brothers/ Disco Dress Up Daisy
programme.desc: Doc and her toys are having an indoor picnic when she unknowingly brings Donny’s glider planes to life. When Dress Up Daisy cracks her arm and gets a cast, one toy is jealous.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: No Bones About It/ Bob's Sock Debacle
programme.desc: When Bonnie’s dinosaur bone is lost, the pups team up with a roadrunner to find it. The pups set out to look for Bob's favorite golf socks before he participates in a tournament.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Don't Rain on My Pug-rade/ Their Royal Pug-ness
programme.desc: When Bob can't leave his house to watch a parade, the pups enlist a family of ducks to march past the house. Bingo and Rolly head to England to learn how a queen is treated.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Take Me Out to the Pug Game
programme.desc: Two puppies who love to have fun take on adventures around their neighbourhood.

programme.title: Bluey: Teasing/ Shaun/ Daddy Robot
programme.desc: Bluey teases Bingo; Bluey and Bingo ask Dad to get a pet; Dad puts Bluey and Bingo to bed.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Kiss Conspiracy/ House Guest
programme.desc: Simon is too embarrassed to kiss his co-star in the school play. So in a moment of desperation, he agrees to allow Alvin to switch identities with him. Alvin secretly decides to rent out their house for a Hawaiian home-swap.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Theozilla/ Doggone It
programme.desc: When Alvin is paired with Simon for a Science project, he accidentally creates a potion that turns Theodore into a 30-foot giant. Later, when all the phones at school are missing, Alvin is blamed and he tries to clear his name.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Mutiny/ Reality or Not
programme.desc: Desperate to avenge last year's loss, The Chipmunks argue over who is best suited to lead them to victory. Later, Alvin is tired of seeing his celebrity status overshadowed by Reality TV stars. So, he decides to become one.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Going Green/ Tattle Tail
programme.desc: Jeanette signs the Chipmunks and Chipettes up for a green living competition. Alvin likes a girl at school so he agrees to look after her talking bird, but he's nervous about the bird blabbing when he says something damaging.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: The App/ Don Juan Theodoro
programme.desc: When Dave gets a parenting app to help supervise the Chipmunks, Alvin tries everything to escape its control. Alvin, Simon, and the Chipettes give Theodore conflicting dating tips when they believe he has a crush on a girl.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Albrittina/ Simon for President
programme.desc: When Alvin catches Simon taking a test to discover his soul mate, he decides to do the same and prove just how silly the test really is. Simon and Alvin decide to rebel and launch their own campaigns for class president.

programme.title: Movie: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Out of the Shadows
programme.desc: With April's help, the Turtles find out that The Shredder has returned and has hired a scientist to create mutants of his own. Adding to their troubles, New York City is invaded by an extraterrestrial army. The Turtles face their toughest fight yet.

programme.title: The Loud House: Net Gains/ Pipe Dreams
programme.desc: Lynn desperately wants to win a basketball championship but gets drafted onto a terrible team. Mom and Dad are sick of waiting in the long bathroom line so they decide to build a secret bathroom.

programme.title: The Loud House: Deal Me Out/ Friendzy
programme.desc: Lincoln and Clyde worry that they may be too old to still be playing Ace Savvy. Lincoln discovers that having a friend over means getting special privileges and he takes advantage of that.

programme.title: The Loud House: Home of the Fave/ Hero Today, Gone Tomorrow
programme.desc: After a pun-filled trip to the grocery store with Luan and Lola, Dad worries Lola thinks he plays favourites. When Lynn's friend Margo is celebrated for a one-in-a-million soccer goal, Lynn has to try and be supportive.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Jailbreak/ Evil Spatula

programme.desc: Plankton tries to befriend Squidward so he can get the Krabby Patty formula. When an art critic deems Patrick a true artiste for his rocks-with-googly-eyes creations, everyone in Bikini Bottom clamours for a Patrick original.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Pineapple Fever/ Chum Caverns
programme.desc: Squidward gets stuck indoors with SpongeBob and Patrick during a storm. Plankton creates an underground restaurant that threatens to put the Krusty Krab out of business.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Whatever Happened to SpongeBob
programme.desc: SpongeBob tries to spend time with his friends but he ends up being a nuisance to everyone instead. They all tell him to go away, so with a heavy heart, he does just that.

programme.desc: Continual distractions almost derail part of a science project others are depending on; a trip to the bookstore finds the comfiest chair in the world, which may have mystical powers.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Sponge Who Could Fly
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick come up with numerous ways to fly.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Big Pink Loser/ Bubble Buddy
programme.desc: Patrick takes SpongeBob on as his role model; SpongeBob feels lonely when Pat's out of town.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SpongeBob 129
programme.desc: Fleeing from SpongeBob and Patrick's incessant noise, Squidward winds up frozen in the Krusty Krab freezer.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Jailbreak/ Evil Spatula
programme.desc: Plankton is in jail and plans to break out with the help of his fellow inmates. SpongeBob's spatula breaks so he replaces it with one of Plankton's.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Krusty Dogs / The Wreck of Mauna Loa

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Chum Bucket Supreme/ Single Cell Anniversary
programme.desc: Plankton hires Patrick to create advertising slogans for the Chum Bucket. SpongeBob helps Plankton find the perfect anniversary gift for Karen.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: 20,000 Patties Under the Sea/ The Battle of Bikini Bottom
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Mr. Krabs turn an old submarine into a mobile Krusty Krab. When Patrick and SpongeBob discover they have clashing views on cleanliness, their disagreement blows up into an epic battle.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: The Two of Clubs/ Vacation Daze
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne and Sid have trouble finding an after-school program they both like. And, Ronnie Anne has to compete with her family for quality time when Maria takes a day off.

programme.desc: The family finds a tamale cart and tries to keep it secret from Abuela. And, Ronnie Anne doesn't believe in an astrological prediction until it comes true.

programme.desc: A strange moon turns everyone in town into wild animals, and Sandy's the only one who can save them. Patrick is sleepwalking and SpongeBob can't wake him up.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Little Yellow Book/ Bumper to Bumper
programme.desc: Squidward finds SpongeBob's diary, and starts reading it out loud in the Krusty Krab.

programme.desc: After a magician hypnotizes Bobby into thinking he's a cat, the family needs to snap him out of it. Ronnie Anne and friends try to uncover what happened to Bruno's hot dog cart.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: What's Love Gato Do With It/ Dial M. for Mustard
programme.desc: After a magician hypnotizes Bobby into thinking he's a cat, the family needs to snap him out of it. Ronnie Anne and friends try to uncover what happened to Bruno's hot dog cart.

programme.desc: Lincoln races his siblings to the couch in order to watch his favourite TV show. Lincoln must delete an angry voicemail from Lori's phone so she doesn't hear it.

programme.desc: Lincoln has a plan for introducing himself to a new girl, but when the sisters catch him he has to avoid them.

programme.desc: Mabel joins a secret knitting club and is pressured by her new friends to gossip, but when she tells them that Dipper likes Wendy, she inadvertently puts Dipper's life in danger.

programme.desc: Mabel finds a way to swap minds with Dipper and the townsfolk, so she uses her new found ability to make a difference in people's lives.

programme.desc: When a prehistoric beast snatches Mabel’s beloved pig Waddles, the Pines family must journey to a land trapped in time to rescue him.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Park Pandemonium/ Cricket's Biscuits
programme.desc: Follow the adventures of a boy whose curiosity and enthusiasm lead him on journeys.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Birmingham
programme.desc: Greek natives and their kin built the Birmingham restaurant scene, from barbecue joints to hotdog stands to steakhouses. Bright Star, founded in 1907, is the old guard and Johnny's is the new guard Greek restaurant. This is what the future looks like.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Athens
programme.desc: Pablo Rivadeneyra rotisserie-cooks lime-marinated chicken in Norwood. Across the street at Scott's BBQ, Larry and Betty Jean Scott work a smoke-belching pit. In these two places, we get a glimpse of the hard work that defines life in the south.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Nashville
programme.desc: One meat and three vegetables is the formula for a typical farmhand meal, translated in the mid-twentieth century to steam table cafes. In Nashville, the differences between Black and White cooking come into focus, and we discover that there are few.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Shreveport
programme.desc: Shreveport emerged in the mid-1800s as a lumber boomtown on the Red River. Cycles of boom and bust has defined this town. Herby K's is a 1936 vintage beer garden and fry house. Lucky Palace serves wok-fried T-bones and pork egg foo young.

programme.title: TrueSouth: New Orleans
programme.desc: From Liuzza's and Mandina's – two Sicilian corner stores that have become neighborhood Creole Italian restaurants – look at how and why some stories get erased while others become defining narratives.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Beaumont
programme.desc: Once a Southern institution, barbecue has become an American obsession and Texas brisket has been mainstreamed. This is a story about a scrappy onetime oil boomtown, where cooks make the most of scraps, and about two Gulf Coast dishes that have hung on.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Hodgenville
programme.desc: In the southern towns of Hodgenville and Bardstown, Kentucky, the land where Lincoln was born, conflicting ideas about identity and purpose come into focus. Onion burgers and country sausage prove constants in a time of great change.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Memphis
programme.desc: Just as there are many Souths, black Memphis reveals itself to be varied and complex and beautiful. Here, we see the streets of Memphis and its classic spots including Pop's Hot Tamales, Lee Crumb and Ms. Girlee's.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Oxford
programme.desc: Get to know the good people of the south through experiencing southern food and culture.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Brownsville
programme.desc: Get to know the good people of the south through experiencing southern food and culture.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Fort Benning
programme.desc: Get to know the good people of the south through experiencing southern food and culture.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Bowman

programme.desc: As Marty recovers from a bad fall, the Raneys scramble against the oncoming winter to finish cabin walls and build a staircase from an ancient family spruce. Matt leads a last-ditch moose hunt pivotal to keeping them stocked with meat through spring.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Surviving the Wild: Alaskans Unite
programme.desc: With added features and bonus scenes: The family commits to a mini-rescue in the community and Misty completes her cabin roof without Maciah. Marty figures out how to transport a cabin-warming gift for Mollee to the Upper 20.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Surviving the Wild: Twist of Fate
programme.desc: With added features and bonus scenes: The Raney clan rushes to finish Misty's cabin while Matt embarks on a big hunt. Tragedy strikes as a fire threatens the Raney's homestead dream.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Raney Ranch: Fire on the Forty
programme.desc: An inferno engulfs Marty and Mollee's cabin at the onset of winter and the Raneys must rally like never before to complete the unfinished clifftop cabin on The Upper 20 in record time complete with heat, water and power.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Georgia Mountain Silo
programme.desc: A young family sets out to build a silo greenhouse home in the Blue Ridge Mountains of Georgia. Their unique build comes with many challenges, however, including unpredictable weather and a treacherous path to the construction site.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Vermont Stone House
programme.desc: Novice builder Danny Clark attempts to construct a 600-square-foot stone cabin in Vermont's White River Valley. The home is sure to be a true work of art but his inexperience, the harsh winter and the unusual architecture push him to his limits.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Raney Ranch: Fire on the Forty
programme.desc: An inferno engulfs Marty and Mollee's cabin at the onset of winter and the Raneys must rally like never before to complete the unfinished clifftop cabin on The Upper 20 in record time complete with heat, water and power.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Georgia Mountain Silo
programme.desc: A young family sets out to build a silo greenhouse home in the Blue Ridge Mountains of Georgia. Their unique build comes with many challenges, however, including unpredictable weather and a treacherous path to the construction site.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Hudson Valley Retreat
programme.desc: Peter and Ashley Jensen build a sustainable straw bale panel house in the Hudson Valley, the first of its kind in the States. With only three months to work, the race against nature is as they attempt to finish before the East Coast winter sets in.

programme.title: Expedition X: Ghosts in the Canal
programme.desc: Josh wants to investigate ghostly sightings and terrifying sounds coming from an abandoned canal along the Potomac. Jess and Phil dive into the murky depths and search secret tunnels that make this America's most haunted waters.

programme.title: Josh Gates Tonight: Ghostly Gates
programme.desc: In a hauntingly funny hour, Josh interviews iconic actor Kevin Bacon, The Sixth Sense's Haley Joel Osment and the stars of the Discovery+ hit, Ghost Brothers. Then, Kindred Spirits' Jack Osbourne joins Josh on a ghost hunt in a haunted Hollywood theater.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Good Man Down
programme.desc: To help boost production, Dave gives gold room operator Jesse Goins the opportunity he's been waiting for, to become a first-time rock truck driver. But all work stops when the crew faces a sudden and unimaginable tragedy.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: After the devastating loss of teammate Jesse Goins, the crew struggles to mine with one man down. When Dave comes under fire from the team about the lack of access to the gold-rich Hummocks, he heads off for a do or die showdown with the local community.

programme.title: Rogue Earth: Hurricanes
programme.desc: In the past two decades, hurricanes along the North American coastline have grown more powerful and destructive. In 2016, Hurricane Matthew wreaks havoc across the continent, decimating parts of the Caribbean before bearing down on the Florida Coast.

programme.title: Dual Survival: No Man Is an Island
programme.desc: Joe sets-off on a mission to locate his new partner, who is on an uninhabited island off the coast of Panama. Using his tracking skills, Joe locates Matt Graham and together they face their first survival situation: getting off of a remote Pacific island.

programme.title: Dual Survival: End of the Road
programme.desc: Stranded deep in the jungle of Vietnam, Joe and Matt take on a real world survival scenario in untamed terrain, but even their expertise can't change the fact that they're up against the hottest and most humid month of the year in South East Asia.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Mayan Mayhem
programme.desc: Trapped in a labyrinth of underground tunnels, Joe and Matt facedown darkness and risk drowning only to emerge on surface and find an inhospitable jungle. Their opposing approaches to survival pit them against one another before bringing them to rescue.

programme.title: Dual Survival: One Shot, One Kill
programme.desc: Lost in a land that time forgot, New Zealand's Fiordland, Joe and Matt face a seemingly ordinary scenario of two hunters following their target into unfamiliar territory, but this time, they've only got one chance to get out alive.

programme.title: Dual Survival: On the Edge
programme.desc: Lost on a perilous ridgeline, at 15,000 feet above sea level, Joe and Matt are forced to descend slippery cliffs through extreme weather conditions, where altitude sickness and hypothermia threaten, and life-preserving fire eludes them.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Into the Canyons
programme.desc: Joe and Matt face down the high desert canyons of Matt's home of 20 years: southern Utah. Without knives or any modern supplies, they attempt to survive and seek rescue in this harsh terrain that's more favorable to rattlesnakes and mountain lions.

programme.title: Extreme Sisters: Us Two and Someone New

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Save a Jungle Miner/ Pups Save Uncle Otis From His Cabin
programme.desc: Uncle Otis takes a trip to a lost gold mine. After wandering off course, Ryder and the Pups must save him from the booby-trapped mine. Uncle Otis installs a Smart Home 3000, in his cabin, that ends up trapping Uncle Otis and Mr. Wingnut inside.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Save a Humsquatch / Pups Save a Far Flung Flying Disc
programme.desc: Travelling Travis yelps for help when he finds a mysterious creature in trouble. A robo-toy causes mayhem in Adventure Bay.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Mighty Pups Charged Up: Pups vs. Three Super Baddies
programme.desc: The three super baddies take the Mighty Pups' meteor. They must get it back and Charge Up to stop them before the team of baddies destroys Adventure Bay.

programme.title: Blue's Clues & You: Blue's Big Neighborhood Adventure

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Save the Skydivers/ Pups Save the Cupcakes

programme.title: Weird Earth: Breathing Forests and Fizzing Fireballs

programme.title: So You Think You'd Survive?: Hurricanes and Freezing Rain

programme.desc: Tasked by Triple H and Stephanie McMahon, Mick Foley launches WWE's mission to reclaim iconic lost memorabilia starting with his own in-ring career. Items on the wish list include Mr. Socko and his 'Cactus Jack' flannel vest.

programme.title: Biography: 'Rowdy' Roddy Piper

programme.title: The First 48 Presents Critical Minutes: Heat of the Moment II
programme.desc: In Atlanta, Detective Summer Benton investigates a deadly dispute; in Rochester, Investigator Terry Dearcop breaks open a case; in Birmingham, Detective Cynthia Morrow figures out how a drug deal went bad.

programme.title: The First 48: Graveyard Love
programme.desc: In New Orleans, a man is ambushed in front of his grandmother's house. Detectives suspect a woman close to the victim may have arranged the shooting, but they need hard evidence to prove it, and quickly before it's too late.

programme.title: The First 48: Killer Contact
programme.desc: When a young man is found shot dead in his van, Tulsa Homicide retraces his final hours and gets caught up in a web of lies.

programme.title: The First 48: Murder in Treme
programme.desc: In New Orleans, when a woman is slashed to death, the investigation into her murder leads Dets. Chuck Ward and Rob Barrere to a house of horrors, and they discover the killer may be someone they least expected.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Party Crasher
programme.desc: Find out which jokers were in on the surprise Gary Busey appearance, where the phrase 'tit for tat' came from, and how Murr's big mouth backfired on him, leading to this Statue of Liberty punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Snow Way Out
programme.desc: Find out which Joker only drinks coffee after 2pm; who is most self-conscious about singing; and how long did Joe and Q wait inside while Murr and Sal hung out on a ski lift in the freezing cold.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Sneaking Number Twos, Going Number One
programme.desc: Find out why the jokers love filming at the grocery store, how many pencils were purchased for put-pocketing and why Sal's pee punishment was twice as terrible as it looked.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Turning the Tables
programme.desc: Find out how the Jokers keep their cover while filming at the mall, and Q's favorite VR word. Plus, learn how long Joe was sore after the table-busting punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Card Against Humanity
programme.desc: Find out which Jokers really wear glasses, how Q was injured the last time he wore his talking brush disguise and what Sal's sole business card actually says.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Needy and the Greedy
programme.desc: A behind the scenes look at the location that refused to let the Jokers film, Joe's injury from being thrown into a tower of cereal and why Q was called a 'loose cannon'.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Smashing Success
programme.desc: The gang learns how hard it is to find good help these days and then later returns to their artistic roots. One joker reluctantly delivers a series of crushing blows.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bleach for America
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr play receptionist for the day and then teach parents proper home-schooling techniques. One joker lands the endorsement deal of a lifetime.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Space Oddity
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr offer evocative responses when taste testing new food. Plus, tonight's loser gets sent to a place far, far away.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: OK Zoomer
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Murr and Joe help job seekers land their next big gig and pitch their memoirs to a focus group. The losing joker will deliver news heard around the world.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Toll Booth Corrector
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes on some of your favourite episodes.

programme.title: Big Trick Energy: Wes-Defying Stunt
programme.desc: Wes gets hometown redemption. Plus, Eric bartends, the boys freak out a tow truck driver and Wes performs the Heimlich maneuver.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Well...
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Joe and Murr play a game of tag at a coffee shop, then convince shoppers to deliver sketchy messages at the grocery store. Plus, tonight's big loser might lose his mind in Impractical Jokers' first-ever non-punishment punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Show Stopper
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Joe and Murr are at Universal Studios in Hollywood. They start off serving up ridiculous surveys, then make things awkward while posing as maintenance workers. Plus, tonight’s big loser can't catch a break…no matter how many times he tries.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Toll Booth Corrector

programme.title: Big Trick Energy: Wes-Defying Stunt

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Lords of the Ring
programme.desc: The guys skirt the law while posing as receptionists, then go fishing at an unlikely locale. And the heat is on tonight's big losers as they try to give one unlucky customer the deal of a lifetime.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Ash Clown
programme.desc: The guys give customers an eye opening experience at a glasses store, and convince customers to pass illicit, and ridiculous, messages while shopping for groceres.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Training Day
programme.desc: The guys go to a supermarket with bells on and try to reminisce with strangers in the park. Plus, tonight's three losers are put through an epic trial by fire.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Q-Pay
programme.desc: The guys kill time in a waiting room by sharing some TMI texts with strangers, then try to sabotage each other as the wingmen from hell at a dating event. Tonight's big loser gets a very special donation from one of the other Jokers.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Parent Trap
programme.desc: The guys get stuck in a grocery post-it showdown, and tonight's big loser earns a time-out for his outrageous behavior at a kids' play space.

programme.title: Botched: To Implant or Not to Implant ... That Is the Question
programme.desc: Rodrigo Alves returns after undergoing three nasal surgeries in less than a year. Later, Terry helps a Texas chef with jarring pain from her breast implants, and a dominatrix undergoes an unconventional procedure for butt projection.

programme.title: Botched: Twin Terrors

programme.title: Botched: 4000cc's and Counting

programme.title: Botched: Sticky Nipples and Paparazzi Nightmares

programme.title: Botched: Meet the Future Mrs. Paul Nassif
programme.desc: A love-crazy Canadian uses her boobs to get to Paul and later, former model has nose fixed before her wedding.

programme.title: Botched: Two Weddings and a Divorce Attorney
programme.desc: Two former brides who weren’t able to have the wedding of their dreams come to see Dr. Nassif and Dr. Dubrow. A divorce attorney with a boob tassel fetish appeals to have her areolas fixed.

programme.title: Movie: Coyote Ugly

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Fit to Flay
programme.desc: "Chopped's" Scott Conant and actress Jane Seymour team up to make Bobby Flay sweat. They've recruited a couple of big-name chefs, New York City's Nate Appleman and Italy's own Silvia Barban, to beat Flay to the finish line.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: A Good Day for a Win
programme.desc: Actor and comedian Mikey Day teams up with Katie Lee, which means double trouble for Bobby Flay as they try to distract him into losing. Asian whiz Minnie Nguyen and Southern expert Adam Hodgson both have one goal: secure a win against Bobby.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Judges as Contenders
programme.desc: The script is flipped and judgment is passed when Beat Bobby Flay judges Michael Psilakis and Seamus Mullen step up to take Bobby down themselves. Food Network's Marcus Samuelsson and Sunny Anderson decide which chef can push Bobby to his limit.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Drop the Knife
programme.desc: Stand-up comedian Colin Quinn and the dashing Katie Lee bring two New York chefs to challenge Bobby. Alex Guarnaschelli's protégé Diane Vista-Wayne and Daniel Boulud's protégé Lauren Brown compete.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Grind it Out!
programme.desc: Los Angeles chef Michael Voltaggio and skateboarding legend Tony Hawk know they can't skate through this competition. They bring in Sichuan master Pablo Zitzmann and young gun Ming Pu to attempt to kick-flip Bobby Flay out of his arena.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: We're All Family Here
programme.desc: Sophie Flay enlists the help of Alton Brown to surprise her father. Jonathan Waxman and Dean Fearing enter the arena to face their protégé Bobby Flay one last time.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Mission: Impastable
programme.desc: Food Network's Chef Anne Burrell brings rising star comedian Jaboukie Young White from The Daily Show to hit Bobby Flay with some breaking news: He's going down. They recruit Italian expert chefs Nicole Karr and David Benstock to make Bobby say 'Ciao.'

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Beauty And The Beast
programme.desc: The arena gets a facelift when New York City's small but mighty chef Deb Caplan takes on Beantown's Nicholas Lisotto.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible: Turning Anger into Action
programme.desc: Robert Irvine steps in to help two restaurant owners whose anger issues are getting in the way of their business success. The owners' big investment in A Pizza Melody in Las Vegas, Nev., has not paid off, and big personal changes are in order.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Getting Grilled
programme.desc: The irons heat up on this special episode of Beat Bobby Flay when the best of the Midwest, Chef Dominic Zumpano, takes on culinary heavyweight, Chef Angelo Sosa, in a grilling battle.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Surf and Turf

programme.desc: Tarek and Christina take out an expensive loan to flip a house in Fountain Valley, CA. A tight timeline pressures them to flip the house quickly.

programme.desc: A couple needs a bigger house for their growing family in Aurora, Colorado. They're looking for a place with a least four bedrooms with room for visiting family, and while he's interesting in a property they can easily flip, she prefers a long-term home.

programme.desc: Tarek and Christina spot a trust sale in Fullerton, California and make an offer on the house.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Freeway Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina get a lead on a home for sale in a historic neighborhood of Anaheim, California. It's well-priced but will need a lot of renovation work to be sure.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Abort Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina get a lead on a promising deal in Long Beach, California. Since the property is currently tenant-occupied, they can't inspect inside the house and their decision to buy will have to be made based on what they can see from the car.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Natural Disaster
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina get a lead from their friend and investor, Pete, on a house he's recently purchased. It's situated in an upscale, gated neighbourhood and it's a house Pete can't tackle on his own.

programme.title: Home Town: Porch Dreams
programme.desc: Amanda is returning to Mississippi after seven years of living in San Antonio, Texas, and she's looking for a historic home with a front porch and room for entertaining for $150,000.

programme.title: Home Town: Military Family Finds Small Town Charm in Mississippi
programme.desc: A well-traveled serviceman and his wife settle down after finding a job in small town Mississippi. Ben and Erin have been given an all-in budget and are tasked with satisfying the couple's wish list that includes a historic home with a chef's kitchen.

programme.title: Home Town: Southern Coastal Style
programme.desc: With an all-in budget of $300,000, a couple is ready to move back home to Mississippi and put down roots after years of moving for work. They need help finding a home with charm and character in a small town.

programme.title: Home Town: Small Town Life Awaits
programme.desc: A Canadian couple looks to purchase a vacation home that will one day become their retirement home. With an all-in budget of $140,000, Ben and Erin show them two Craftsman cottages.

programme.desc: Ben and Erin begin revitalizing a small town by turning a foster couple's home into a welcoming space for kids. Dave and Jenny Marrs join in to help them tackle a boutique on the brink of closure, and a special guest surprises Wetumpka with a performance.

programme.title: Home Town: Takeover: The Mayor is Also the Barber
programme.desc: Ben and Erin step in to give a family and their iconic house a much-needed boost. Then, the Napiers and Hot Mess House's Wendell Holland unearth some original 1920s charm for a local barbershop that is both a community and political hub.

programme.title: Home Town: Takeover: Longest Bar in Alabama
programme.desc: Ben and Erin are ready to serve Wetumpka's sole female police officer and youth advocate with the surprise renovation of her dreams. Then, Texas Two Step's Jon Pierre and Mary assist the Napiers in opening up the local sports bars to stunning river views.

programme.desc: Jon Knight must preserve the history of a 280-year-old farmhouse while also making it feasible for modern living. When he learns that part of the foundation is beyond saving, he makes the shocking proposition to the owners to tear down half of the home.

programme.title: Farmhouse Fixer: A Farmhouse for a Chef
programme.desc: An outdated farmhouse is transformed into a functional family home with an earthy design. Jon Knight and Kristina Crestin create a kitchen fit for a chef, a cozy, traditional New England family room and even a goat jungle gym for their new farm animals.

programme.title: Farmhouse Fixer: Third Generation Renovation
programme.desc: A historical house from 1873 is transformed into a vibrant, modern home for a young family. Jon Knight and Kristina Crestin give this family of five a home with fun colors, shiny brass, whimsical bird wallpaper and even a beehive.

programme.title: Jessie: One Day Wonders

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Thing on Hell Mountain
