programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Greatest Icons
programme.desc: Places that were once home to Hollywood films and world-famous musicians are now run-down, abandoned, and forbidden; experts investigate their mysteries and reveal the astonishing secrets behind ten of the world's most iconic abandoned places.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Haunting of Heartbreak Castle
programme.desc: Experts investigate what was once a fairy-tale castle, but now is abandoned, and rumored to be haunted. They uncover secrets of the ancient fortress, and its ghostly stories.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Ruins of the Wild West
programme.desc: America's Wild West is home to abandoned ruins that attest to the strange, dark, and mysterious things that once happened here. Experts investigate the secrets behind these desolate places to uncover how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Good, the Bad, and the Abandoned
programme.desc: The world's abandoned structures hold new evidence about the lives and deeds of history's greatest heroes and villains, and using the latest discoveries at these mysterious sites, experts count down the ten most significant.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Nightmare at Fort Paranoia
programme.desc: A strange bunker in a treacherous landscape once belonged a notorious dictator who's paranoid fantasies drove bizarre and elaborate feats of engineering. New discoveries reveal the secrets of these structures and why the nightmares that built them.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Good, the Bad, and the Abandoned
programme.desc: The world's abandoned structures hold new evidence about the lives and deeds of history's greatest heroes and villains, and using the latest discoveries at these mysterious sites, experts count down the ten most significant.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Nightmare at Fort Paranoia
programme.desc: A strange bunker in a treacherous landscape once belonged a notorious dictator who's paranoid fantasies drove bizarre and elaborate feats of engineering. New discoveries reveal the secrets of these structures and why the nightmares that built them.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Ruins of the Wild West
programme.desc: America's Wild West is home to abandoned ruins that attest to the strange, dark, and mysterious things that once happened here. Experts investigate the secrets behind these desolate places to uncover how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Deadly Engineering: Nightmare in Hell Valley
programme.desc: After torrential rainfall triggers a catastrophic landslide, a small village in the valley below is devastated, and now, new discoveries reveal the truth behind the engineering that led to this fatal disaster.

programme.title: Deadly Engineering: Day of the Death Quake
programme.desc: The devastating Northridge earthquake struck Los Angeles in 1994 killing 57 people and causing $20 billion in damage in less than 20 seconds; expert scientists and engineers investigate why these structures were not prepared for the violent disaster.

programme.title: Deadly Engineering: Calamity in Space
programme.desc: On a test flight for an experimental Virgin Galactic spacecraft, catastrophic design flaws send this multi-million dollar endeavor on a crash course to tragedy. Experts investigate what caused this visionary engineering marvel to fail.

programme.title: Deadly Engineering: NASA's Columbia Disaster
programme.desc: After a ground-breaking NASA mission, the space shuttle Columbia meets catastrophe as it re-enters Earth's atmosphere; expert engineers and scientists investigate the cause of this tragic disaster.

programme.title: Disasters Engineered: Exxon Valdez Declassified
programme.desc: When the Exxon Valdez oil tanker spills millions of gallons of crude oil at sea, it contaminates Alaska's pristine coastline and creates an apocalyptic environmental catastrophe; experts investigate what caused this horrific disaster.

programme.title: Building Giants: World's Biggest Cargo Ship
programme.desc: A team of expert engineers must build the world's largest cargo ship in just 12 months, and to do so, they use cutting-edge technology and the latest construction methods in a race to complete the massive project on schedule.

programme.title: Building Giants: Rise of the Monster Bridge
programme.desc: As expert engineers race against the clock to build the biggest bridge in Ireland, they use cutting-edge tech and innovative construction methods in a fight against unpredictable weather and deadly heights to complete the massive project on time.

programme.title: Building Giants: Arctic Monster Ship
programme.desc: The world's best shipbuilders join forces to build a state-of-the-art ship that comes equipped with two submarines. Using cutting-edge engineering, it can brave the Arctic Ocean's worst winters and deadliest seas.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering: The Real Iron Man Suit
Impossible Engineering: F-35 Fighter Jet
programme.desc: The F-35 is the most advanced fighter jet on the planet, and special access into the most expensive military program ever reveals how engineers use cutting-edge technology to outfit this 1,200 mile-per-hour aircraft with a state-of-the-art stealth system.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering: Chernobyl's Toughest Fix
programme.desc: The Chernobyl disaster created one of the world's deadliest places, and as the temporary fix around the damaged reactor begins to fail, engineers race to build a cutting-edge structure to contain the contamination that could threaten the world.

programme.title: Human+: The Future of Our Senses: Hearing
Strange Evidence: Doomsday Volcano NYC
programme.desc: A massive plume of smoke suddenly erupts from the ground in Manhattan, and experts investigate if this terrifying event is evidence of a volcano waking up beneath the streets of New York City and if it's almost due to blow.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Shallow Grave
programme.desc: Christmas will never be the same for the two local residents of Noble, Oklahoma whose dog drops a human skull onto their front porch. After six years and no leads, the police must navigate the twists and turns of the victim's past to find redemption.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Knock Knock
programme.desc: A gathering of friends turns deadly when two gunmen shoot William Davis in the head. When the witnesses are unable to provide any solid leads, Lt. Joe Kenda and his team dig into his past and start to suspect someone in William's circle is lying.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Written in Blood
programme.desc: A community is shocked when Antoine McKenzie is brazenly shot outside an auto parts store in broad daylight. But when no witnesses can identify the killer, the only lead left for Lt. Joe Kenda is a final message written in the victim's own blood.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Standoff
programme.desc: An unhinged divorcee with a score to settle initiates an armed standoff from the cramped confines of his trailer park. Then a disabled man is killed on the job, but Kenda's case hits a roadblock when forensic evidence is scrubbed from the scene.

programme.title: A Time to Kill: Undoing Behavior
programme.desc: A 36-year-old woman lies strangled to death in her own home. Clues at the scene indicate she knew her killer well enough to let them in and that the resulting murder was spontaneous. Now, police race to discover who could want this mother dead and why.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: What's Mine is Mine
programme.desc: A couple moves into their dream home on the same street where they've lived for years, only to find themselves engulfed in a wrenching conflict with their neighbour who believes he's the rightful owner of their property.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: To Infinity and Back
programme.desc: When Claire Throssell meets Darren Sykes, she thinks her future husband's overwhelming displays of affection are signs of love. She fails to see that Darren is out to control her, and if he doesn't get his way, the revenge he takes will be terrible.

programme.title: A Time to Kill: Undoing Behavior
programme.desc: A 36-year-old woman lies strangled to death in her own home. Clues at the scene indicate she knew her killer well enough to let them in and that the resulting murder was spontaneous. Now, police race to discover who could want this mother dead and why.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: What's Mine is Mine

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: They Let Him Out
programme.desc: When Clare Bradburn's ex-husband, Ed, suddenly confessed to his crime after 26 years, she thought she finally had justice, but she never expected that her nightmare would continue.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Written in Blood
programme.desc: A community is shocked when Antoine McKenzie is brazenly shot outside an auto parts store in broad daylight. But when no witnesses can identify the killer, the only lead left for Lt. Joe Kenda is a final message written in the victim's own blood.

programme.title: A Crime to Remember: Damsel on Death Row
programme.desc: Los Angeles, CA, 1934: Eric Madison is found dead in a boarding house at the back of the Warner Brother's lot. But in an age where propriety is paramount, will the punishment fit the crime?

programme.title: A Crime to Remember: Mother's Little Helper
programme.desc: After the blood-soaked body of 76 year old Franklin Bradshaw is found behind the counter of his auto-parts store, detectives dig into the strained history of his family and uncover a hotbed of deceit, manipulation and all-consuming greed.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Hunter
programme.desc: When a young U.S. army combat medic goes missing, a bounty hunter takes on his biggest case ever, to find Kelli Bordeaux.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Death of Todd Stermer
programme.desc: Linda Stermer, accused of arson and murdering her husband, speaks out for the first time.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: Local Mysteries: Fatal Family and The Southern Stalker
programme.desc: A family of five in Cushing, WI mysteriously vanishes, leaving behind a 15-year-old boy with a dark secret. Plus, a string of gruesome murders in Augusta, GA terrifies a community and has investigators wondering if a serial killer is on the loose.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: Local Mysteries: Burned Alive and a Mom Missing
programme.desc: A young woman is set on fire in Courtland, MS and gains national attention. Plus, a mom goes missing in Altoona, WI.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: No Witnesses
programme.desc: When two young ladies don't return home after a run to the local drive-thru, their concerned parents immediately set out on a search to find them. However it will be a fisherman that will give police their first clue that something evil has happened.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Roses are Red, Murder is Too
programme.desc: When a town counsel member is found murdered in her home, residents of Berryville, Virginia are appalled. With the only evidence being the single bullet that took her life, the slaying begins to look more and more like a professional hit.

programme.title: Home Alone: First Flame
programme.desc: Sophia Putney-Wilcox is excited to start her senior year of high school after ending her abusive relationship with her boyfriend Adam. Unable to take the rejection, Adam breaks into her house with a bottle of gasoline and a lighter.

programme.title: American Nightmare: The Answering Machine
programme.desc: When a charitable, up-and-coming actress is savagely murdered in her home, police believe an angry, revenge-hungry killer is responsible. No one could expect the lies, obsessions, and evidence that will be uncovered in this shocking cold case.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Sole Survivor
programme.desc: A woman's exclusive and emotional conversation with her adoptive father, Donald Robinson, who discusses his belief at the time that her adoption was legitimate and learning about his brother's horrific crimes.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Sole Survivor
programme.desc: A woman's exclusive and emotional conversation with her adoptive father, Donald Robinson, who discusses his belief at the time that her adoption was legitimate and learning about his brother's horrific crimes.

programme.title: Murder Among Friends: The Rabbit Hole

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Death Outranks Love
programme.desc: It's a military match made in heaven for Roger and Margorie. But a tangled nest of financial secrets and twisted lies ruins the young couple's future. And while the rise of their careers and romance seems meteoric, the ensuing fall is deadly.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Deliverance
programme.desc: All seems lost for the Allies. The Italians are defeated at Caporette, and a Bolshevik Russia pulls out of the war. But the American reinforcements are decisive, and the Allies emerge victorious.

programme.title: Waco Standoff: As We Watched

programme.desc: A couple's beach cottage in Dewey, Delaware, is just a few steps to the beach, but the house has no curb appeal and feels dated. They enlist Marnie to give it a face lift, but during demolition, Marnie finds that the foundation is sinking into the sand.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Sun Room to Fun Room
programme.desc: After years of pleading from their daughters, this couple has agreed to renovate their '90s themed house. Now it's up to Marnie to bring their house into the 21st century and make it comfortable enough for three generations.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Big Family, Bigger Beach Home
programme.desc: A couple's Dewey Beach home has become cramped and in need of reconfiguration. With a new open-concept layout, Marnie aims to preserve the integrity of the house while improving the flow and maximizing space.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Open-Concept Canal Home

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Amazing A-Frame
programme.desc: A couple turns to Marnie to help them transform their shabby A-frame retreat into a beautiful family beach home.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Boxed in at the Beach
programme.desc: Chris and Danielle's cottage in Bethany Beach, Delaware, is too cramped for their family of five. Marnie attempts to convert the wasted deck space and bare backyard into a spacious beach escape.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Bethany Beach Bunks
programme.desc: A family with a new baby is bursting out of their cramped bungalow in Bethany Beach, Delaware. Marnie creates more space for the family by opening up the kitchen, relocating a laundry room and building magical bunk beds to accommodate the children.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Bring It on in Brigantine, NJ
programme.desc: After spending many summer days vacationing on the Jersey Shore, a couple is ready to buy a getaway of their own in Brigantine, NJ.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Wowing In Wildwood
programme.desc: A couple that's relocating from the Washington, DC, area to Wildwood, New Jersey, finds the perfect beach house for their family of five. It needs serious renovating, and while they have a big budget, they also have a big wish list.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Makeover in Margate, New Jersey
programme.desc: Sharon hunts for a beachfront home where she and her kids can rediscover the magic of the Jersey Shore. With a tight budget and a big wish list, they hope to pull off all the renovations and create the family retreat of their dreams.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Tough Times in Topsail
programme.desc: A beach-loving couple looks for a forever home in Topsail, North Carolina, and finds a property with potential that needs major renovations.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: North Carolina Renewal
programme.desc: After a recent medical scare, Nicole is ready to live life to the fullest in a home by the water in Moorehead City, NC.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: As Good as Mom's
programme.desc: Wolfgang Puck, Curtis Stone and Andrew Zimmern talk about dishes that remind them of Mom.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: The Upper Crust
programme.desc: The best part of any dish is what holds it all together: the crust! Chef Beau MacMillan's favorite pot pie in Phoenix, Arizona, takes on Duff Goldman's seafood pie pick in Baton Rouge, Louisiana.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Desert Island Dish
programme.desc: Mayday! Mayday! The chefs and foodies are stranded on a desert island with nothing but an appetite, and they're sharing the one dish they simply can't live without.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Terrific Italian
programme.desc: Celebrity chefs and Cooking Channel personalities are talking about the most sensational Italian food they've ever had. Alton Brown revisits a decadent, old-world pasta dish.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Outer Banks
programme.desc: Andrew highlights the seafood lover's paradise of North Carolina's Outer Banks region. The unique location serves up dishes like blue crab, Hatteras clam chowder, baked oysters and other mouthwatering feasts born of the ocean.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Las Vegas
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern goes on a gastronomic tour of Las Vegas, NV. From quail breast stuffed with foie gras and mouth-watering Waygu steaks to classic veal Parmigiana and tantalizing Thai, Sin City has it all.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Aruba
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern takes a culinary tour of Aruba, where the climate is as warm as the people. He indulges in local favorites like hearty Dutch pea soup, comforting yet elegant seafood cazuela and sweet, buttery cashew cake.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Boston: A Second Bite
programme.desc: Boston is the heart of New England, the birthplace of American independence and home to so many delicious foods that it calls for more than one visit! Andrew Zimmern explores the flavours of Boston neighborhoods.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Boston
programme.desc: In Boston, Andrew sets out to prove that a city steeped in American history can also be a breeding ground for new, exciting food trends. Andrew finds that American ingenuity and independence are front-row center in this tour through Boston.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Undiscovered Hawaii
programme.desc: Andrew wants to find out what Hawaiians really like to eat. From dried octopus bile sac to crispy pork intestine, Andrew gets a taste of Hawaii's other side.

programme.title: Fire Masters: A Cut Above the Roast
programme.desc: Three chefs bring some serious grill game in the Wildfire Round. Then, the battle between bread and butter is fierce in the Crossfire Round, and luxurious ingredients ignite the competitors in the Feast of Fire.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hoboken, New Jersey
programme.desc: Casey Webb's appetizing adventures take him to Hoboken, New Jersey, New York's neighbor to the west and the home of the great Frank Sinatra. He munches on homemade mozzarella and takes a bite out of a bagel behemoth.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Philadelphia, Pa

programme.desc: A chronicle of the triumphs and hurdles of brothers Barry, Maurice, and Robin Gibb, otherwise known as the Bee Gees.

programme.title: The Nevers: True
programme.desc: In Victorian England, people suddenly begin to manifest abnormal abilities.

programme.title: Mare of Easttown: Illusions

programme.title: Movie: The Dark Knight Rises
programme.desc: Batman makes his return to Gotham when Bane, a new underground terrorist, threatens to take over the city.

programme.title: Movie: Live by Night
programme.desc: The outlaw son of the Boston Police Deputy Superintendent starts an illegal rum-running business to fuel his quest for revenge. His sense of justice leads to many run-ins with the gangsters he refuses to work for, and he learns his quest comes at a price.

programme.title: Between the World and Me
programme.desc: First published in 2015, 'Between the World and Me' was written by Ta-Nehisi Coates’ to his teenage son, and recounts the author’s experiences growing up in Baltimore’s inner city and the fear of violence against the Black community.

programme.title: Movie: The Hundred-Foot Journey
programme.desc: A culinary prodigy and his family open an Indian restaurant in a charming French village, directly across the street from a Michelin starred French restaurant with a haughty proprietress.

programme.title: Movie: Employee of the Month
programme.desc: Tensions crackle when a beautiful cashier, with a reputation for dating Employees of the Month, transfers in to a giant discount store. To win her over, a slacker decides to pull out all the stops and win the coveted award.

programme.title: Movie: Billy Madison
programme.desc: A hotel tycoon named Brian Madison has doubts about his immature and non-educated son's ability to run the family business. His son agrees to repeat elementary and high school to prove that he is worthy to take over his father's hotel empire.

programme.title: Movie: The Boy in the Striped Pajamas
programme.desc: Through the eyes of an eight-year-old boy shielded from the reality of World War II, we witness a forbidden friendship that forms between the son of a Nazi commandant and a Jewish boy held captive in a concentration camp.

programme.title: Movie: Antwone Fisher
programme.desc: Due to a habit of starting violent altercations, a young Navy man is forced to see a psychiatrist after an outburst against a crewman. He eventually reveals a traumatic childhood and learns to overcome his painful past in a quest to find his family.

programme.title: Movie: Greenland
programme.desc: When a stray comet enters the solar system, scientists quickly realize it is on a collision course with Earth. Panic ensues as humanity faces extinction. One man desperately tries to get his family to what shelter there may be from the comet's strike.

programme.title: Movie: Summerland
programme.desc: A reclusive writer from Southern England, is entrusted with the care of a young evacuee from London. As WW II rages across the channel, the evacuee rekindles suppressed feelings and emotions from the writer's past and the two bond.

programme.title: Movie: The Texas Chain Saw Massacre
programme.desc: A chainsaw wielding killer terrorizes a group of teens visiting their grandpa's old house.

programme.title: Movie: House at the End of the Street
programme.desc: When a mother and daughter move into a new home, they soon realise that they live next door to a house with a violent history.

programme.title: Movie: The Blackcoat's Daughter
programme.desc: When two girls are left alone over winter break at their prep school, they discover an evil force is stalking them. Meanwhile, a troubled girl is trying to get to the school. As the girls struggle to survive, they learn a secret that links all of them.

programme.title: Movie: The Exorcist
programme.desc: When a girl is thought to be possessed by the Devil, a troubled priest intervenes.

programme.title: City on a Hill: Pax Bostonia

programme.title: Movie: Law Abiding Citizen
programme.desc: After one of the men who killed his wife and daughter is set free, Clyde Shelton takes justice into his own hands and begins taking out everyone that was connected to the case.

programme.title: Movie: Cop Land

programme.desc: When a woman suspects her husband's possible infidelity due to his numerous business trips, she discovers he has a second wife and reveals illegal business dealings with his father-in-law, which he will stop at nothing to protect.

programme.title: Movie: Deranged Granny
programme.desc: Unannounced visits escalate to murder when a woman will do anything to protect her relationship with her grandchildren.

programme.title: Movie: Obsession: Stalked by My Lover
programme.desc: A young woman falls for her attractive and charismatic new roommate, but soon discovers he isn't who he says he is.

programme.title: Movie: Addicted
programme.desc: A successful businesswoman has a happy life and a strong marriage, but finds herself drawn to another man. What begins as a temptation becomes an addiction, as her indiscretions lead her down a path that could cost her more than just her marriage.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Butcher Baker: Terror in the Wilderness Part 1
programme.desc: The Butcher Baker was one of the most prolific rapists and serial killers in Alaska’s history. For more than a decade, he kidnapped young women and brought them into the wilderness where he shot them like prey, until one woman escaped.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Butcher Baker: The Girls Who Got Away Part 2
programme.desc: The Butcher Baker serial killer was hiding in plain sight. He presented himself as a soft-spoken family man and was prowling the streets at night, stalking his prey. One woman’s story led police to a shocking discovery.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Last Gasp
programme.desc: After a young mom is found brutally murdered in her home, investigators find startling clues on her cell phone that could lead to her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Inside Pocket
programme.desc: An insurance agent is shot execution style in his office in broad daylight but the killer leaves no fingerprints and there is no murder weapon found at the scene. Then, investigators discover a critical clue invisible to the naked eye.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Church Lady
programme.desc: A gruesome discovery in a small town church sends investigators on a search for a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Car Accident
programme.desc: A healthy, young mother mysteriously dies after a minor traffic accident triggering an investigation to find out what caused of her death.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Killer Snapshot
programme.desc: An amazing new forensic tool turns a cold case around.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Black Hole
programme.desc: Investigators search for clues after a body is discovered in a watery grave.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nursery Crimes
programme.desc: Medical investigators have no answers as to why children at a Texas hospital are dying at a higher rate than at any other hospital until they discover that one nurse seems to be on-duty in almost all the fatal cases.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Lasting Impressions
programme.desc: Examine intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Foundation of Lies
programme.desc: The wife of a noted doctor goes missing and authorities believe it may have to do with an allegedly shady adoption ring until her husband goes house-shopping with another woman claiming to be his wife.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Unholy Vows
programme.desc: Some of the refugees who sought asylum in the United States after World War II lied about the atrocities in which they’d participated. Years later, a high-ranking religious figure is suspected of war crimes.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Buddhist Monk Murders
programme.desc: Several monks are found massacred at a Buddhist temple.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Gone Ballistic
programme.desc: When a middle-aged man is gunned down in his own home, the motive appears to be robbery, but a mysterious greeting card blows the investigation wide open.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Seeing Red
programme.desc: A high school student vanishes without a trace. False leads force detectives to work double time until a prostitute's murder demands police attention and the possibility arises that the same killer may have struck twice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Southside Strangler
programme.desc: Learn how investigators caught Timothy Wilson Spencer, better known as the Southside Strangler, a serial killer responsible for the murders of five women in Virginia. This was the first use of DNA profiling in the U.S. justice system.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Legionnaires' Disease
programme.desc: History was made in Philadelphia in the summer of 1976 -- not because of the bicentennial, but because of the mysterious death of 34 Legionnaires.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sex, Lies and DNA
programme.desc: While Earl Morris was vacationing in California, he learned his wife had gone missing from their home in Arizona. The search for Ruby Morris involved dozens of investigators and scientists, even the coast guard.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bitter Potion
programme.desc: When a woman comes down with flu-like symptoms and eventually dies, a neurologist suspects she was poisoned with radioactive thallium. The FBI suspects her neighbour, who had a very extensive background in chemistry.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Expert Witness
programme.desc: A woman's tragedy may help bring closure to a 13-year-old case where a young mother was brutally sexually assaulted and killed in her own apartment.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hack Attack
programme.desc: A successful and growing manufacturing company is suddenly hit with a massive computer crash, jeopardizing the future of the company.

programme.title: Forensic Files: See No Evil
programme.desc: Police uncover a string of murdered prostitutes, each of which have had their eyes carved out.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Needle in a Haystack
programme.desc: There was no apparent reason for the young, healthy college student to be dead. But when the medical examiner found the tiniest of clues during the autopsy, investigators were able to unravel the mystery of betrayal and revenge.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Room With a View
programme.desc: The victim had been stabbed more than a hundred times and her bedroom was soaked with blood. While her body was positioned in a suggestive way, she hadn't been sexually assaulted.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: James Jordan: Vanished

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Boston Marathon: Reconstructing the Crime Scene (Part 1)
programme.desc: On April 15th 2013, two bombs explode during the iconic Boston Marathon, killing three spectators and injuring hundreds others. In a race against time, investigators, using state of the art technology, circulate images to the public.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Boston Marathon: The Manhunt (Part 2)
programme.desc: With the Boston Bombing suspects identified as domestic terrorist brothers, the manhunt begins, a terrifying crime spree ensues, and new information sheds light on the heinous crime.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Who Killed Chandra Levy?
programme.desc: Intern Chandra Levy vanishes in May of 2001 in Washington, D.C. Her cell phone and keys are found by police in her apartment that shows no signs of trouble, leading them to question where she went and who saw her last.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Atlanta Serial Killer: Do You Know Where Your Children Are? (Part 1)
programme.desc: From 1979 to 1981, more than two dozen of Atlanta’s black children, mostly boys and young men, disappeared without a trace. Someone was killing the city's most vulnerable children for an unknown reason.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Papa's Got a Brand New Dredge
programme.desc: Shawn must get the remastered Myrtle Irene onto the water. Zeke bets on himself by helping on Vernon's claim. Emily hopes to add to her all-star squad. Kris and his sceptic crew finally head to Elim.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Drilling Down: Enter the Promised Land

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Winter's Warning

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Ship of Fools
programme.desc: Kris and crew face one mishap after another in Elim. Shawn pursues complete control over the inland mine. Vernon pits his divers against each other in a gold-getting competition. Steve and Emily prospect on the beach.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: One Bad Deal
programme.desc: Christine Rose and Shawn's future are on the line after a bar brawl breaks out. Ian calls in a friend for advice.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Hump Day
programme.desc: Learn how the crew attracted more customers to eat at GRK, what piece of iconic 'Jokers' history was made in this same focus group space and who caused several delays in the filming of Q's zoo punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Out of Left Field
programme.desc: Find out whose familiar face showed up in the waiting room, how many dogs Sal had to babysit, and which Joker came up with the punishment that left Joe feeling numb.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Autograph Corrector
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes to find out questions and trivia like why Q wore a wedding ring during a challenge, which crew member slapped him way too hard, and who has a history with the punishment guest.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Bogey Man
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes and discover who considered taking a quick thumbs down. Plus, find out what type of vacation Murr prefers, and how many attempts it took to film the punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Hell on Wheels
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes and discover what kind of vehicle the Jokers had to stay in for a challenge. Plus, find out how Murr’s TV career actually started. Finally, find out why tonight's punishment was nostalgic for the guys.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Joker for a Day
programme.desc: Find out which challenges the crew loves the most and what the original name for the TV show started off as. Also, find out how the Jokers pick their victims.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Pay It Forward
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes on the very first Impractical Jokers episode and discover what social superpower the Jokers now possess. Plus, find out which audio equipment is not used anymore and the true history around Joe's 'nosing'.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Butterfly Crime Scene
programme.desc: Find out what classic phrase was uttered in this early episode that is still said today, and what unaired challenges almost made it to the show. Plus, the real backstory of Butterfly Crime Scene.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Unmotivational Speaker
programme.desc: Find out which classic Joker’s lines are still being uttered and which of the Alma Mater’s gets mentioned. Plus, what inspired tonight’s punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Drawing a Blank
programme.desc: Find out what classic bit began in this early episode, which Jokers used to live together, and why filming in Times Square became a bad idea.

programme.desc: Kim and Khloe are curious about Kourtney's new friend, Addison Rae. Scared by the state of the world, Kim takes measures to prepare for the future, while Kris is afraid to let her mom celebrate her birthday during a pandemic.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Great Ex-pectations
programme.desc: Kourtney sets boundaries with her Poosh team when the line between business and friendship becomes blurred. Caitlyn reaches out to Kris for some help with a business venture. Khloe and Tristan have an unexplainable experience while searching for aliens.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Summer of Love
programme.desc: Scott finally admits he's still in love with Kourtney. Khloè sets out in search of a homeless man who made a lasting impact on her years ago. Kim enlists the help of a professional to make her TikTok dancing debut.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Summer of Love

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The End of an Era

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Season of Change
programme.desc: Khloè runs into some unexpected obstacles while exploring surrogacy. Scott worries that the family will drift apart now that the show is coming to an end. Kim is determined to figure out who is behind the satirical social media page NorisBlackBook.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Keeping Up with the Kids

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Fast Food Their Way

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out: Parm and Polenta Cake Make Everything Better
programme.desc: Michael Symon makes his grilled eggplant parmesan outdoors on the grill and whips up a classic accompaniment with salami and provolone, antipasti salad with campfire dressing.

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out: Ranching Out with Ribs and Corn
programme.desc: Michael Symon turns the flavors of ranch dressing into a rub for Ranch-Rubbed Pork Ribs. He also uses it in Baked Sweet Potatoes with Charred Onion Ranch Dip. Michael's wife, Liz, makes Grilled Corn with Ranchovy Butter, featuring the rub yet again.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home: Dinner Start to Finish
programme.desc: Ree Drummond makes dinner in real time, beginning at the end with an old favorite, perfect potluck dessert. Then she moves on to classic steak Diane, easy roasted parmesan potatoes and incredible garlic butter mushrooms.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Night Out Night In
programme.desc: With the kids out on the town at a street party, Ree Drummond and Ladd enjoy a night in. They're cooking surf and turf skewers with Cajun hollandaise, a romaine wedge salad with loaded ranch dressing and rummy pineapples and cream to keep things sweet.

programme.title: The Kitchen: A Spin on Spring
programme.desc: The Kitchen hosts spin the Seasonal Wheel of Produce to create recipes showcasing their favorite spring ingredients, including asparagus and rhubarb, in delicious new ways. Chrissy Teigen's mom, Pepper, stops by with the scoop on her new cookbook.

programme.title: Valerie's Hot Dish: Valerie's Hot Dish

programme.title: Food Paradise: Go Big or Go Hungry

programme.title: Food Paradise: Slice of Heaven

programme.title: Food Paradise: Blast From the Past
programme.desc: Restaurants reveal the dishes that have stood the test of time and provide soul-satisfying experiences for their customers, from chocolate egg creams at a 1950s soda fountain in NYC to a San Francisco bakery reimagining Old World confections.

programme.desc: Todd surprises Julie with a yacht. Chase gets on his parent's bad side after ditching the kids.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Puppy Love
programme.desc: Chase struggles to apologize to Emmy, and Miley's illness leads to an unexpected reunion for Todd.

programme.title: Movie: Me Before You

programme.title: Movie: Bring It On: Worldwide #Cheersmack

programme.title: Top Chef: Restaurant Wars

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York: New Girl on the Block

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York: Freddy’s Back!

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York: House of Style

programme.title: Shahs of Sunset: 50 Shades of Shouhed

programme.title: Movie: Home Again

programme.title: Movie: Green Book

programme.title: Pride: 1980s: Underground

programme.title: Pride: 1990s: The Culture Wars
programme.desc: The 1990s were supposed to herald a new era for the LBTQ+ community, but instead brought about 'Culture Wars.' They were fought everywhere and devastated communities, but they also galvanized people to create polices and organizations.

programme.title: Pride: 2000s: Y2Gay
programme.desc: The 2000s ushered in a new age of queer visibility, but the struggle for trans rights continued.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Curse of the Zombie Graveyard
programme.desc: Cameras capture something shocking in a cemetery: empty graves, as if the dead walked out in the middle of the night; using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate what's behind this apparent evidence of zombie activity.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Omen of Satan's Crown
programme.desc: A bizarre explosion is captured that morphs into a sinister black ring of smoke above a California football stadium; experts investigate and uncover an underground network of Satanists with connections to a string of modern-day terrorist plots.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Temple of Terror
programme.desc: A mysterious explosion rocks the streets in Cambodia and it may be linked to a temple complex. Motorcyclists encounter what may be a legendary humanoid cannibal, and a cursed mineshaft could explain paranormal activity in a town's antique center.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Neanderthal Bigfoot Attack
programme.desc: When a close encounter with an enraged ape-like creature is caught on camera, experts investigate if it's evidence of a once-extinct Neanderthal specimen engineered by a nearby experimental research facility.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Alien of the Amazon
programme.desc: When cameras capture footage of a strange, blob-like alien in the Amazon jungle, some experts suspect that the origins of this monster are stranger-than-fiction; using cutting-edge science, investigators try to explain this bizarre beast.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Temple of Terror
programme.desc: A mysterious explosion rocks the streets in Cambodia and it may be linked to a temple complex. Motorcyclists encounter what may be a legendary humanoid cannibal, and a cursed mineshaft could explain paranormal activity in a town's antique center.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Neanderthal Bigfoot Attack
programme.desc: When a close encounter with an enraged ape-like creature is caught on camera, experts investigate if it's evidence of a once-extinct Neanderthal specimen engineered by a nearby experimental research facility.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Alien of the Amazon
programme.desc: When cameras capture footage of a strange, blob-like alien in the Amazon jungle, some experts suspect that the origins of this monster are stranger-than-fiction; using cutting-edge science, investigators try to explain this bizarre beast.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Omen of Satan's Crown
programme.desc: A bizarre explosion is captured that morphs into a sinister black ring of smoke above a California football stadium; experts investigate and uncover an underground network of Satanists with connections to a string of modern-day terrorist plots.

programme.title: Unearthed: Hunt for King Arthur's Castle
programme.desc: A castle in Scotland could be the home of King Arthur's legendary round table. Scientists have made a gruesome discovery at this mysterious site: a disfigured skeleton that could reveal the castle's bloody secrets and rewrite the history books.

programme.title: Unearthed: Nero's Lost Palace
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal the scandals and secrets of Nero and his lost palace. Using cutting-edge technology, experts may confirm if the infamous emperor burned down Rome so his could build his golden wonder.

programme.title: Unearthed: Secrets of the Black Pyramid
programme.desc: Egypt's Black Pyramid is the strange, crumbling pyramid that collapsed before its pharaoh was ever buried here, and today, it's largely unexplored. Special access to a hi-tech archaeological investigation reveals what went so catastrophically wrong.

programme.title: Unearthed: Leaning Tower of Pisa: The New Mystery
programme.desc: The Leaning Tower of Pisa is one of the world's most iconic buildings, and it's also the site of an 800-year-old mystery; using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate the archaeological evidence to reveal when it might finally fall over.

programme.title: Unearthed: Summit of the Gods
programme.desc: Go inside the Acropolis, an ancient engineering marvel that has stood above the city of Athens for thousands of years. Follow the scientists working to reveal its hidden mysteries: how it was built, what it looked like, and why it's still standing today.

programme.title: Forbidden History: In Search of King Arthur
programme.desc: The legend of King Arthur is one of a courageous fighter and leader in battle, but for centuries, the fabled king has been a mystery to historians. Find out if his story of Camelot, Excalibur and Guinevere just an elaborate fairytale.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Real Ark of the Convenant
programme.desc: The Biblical mystery of the whereabouts of the Ark of the Covenant is unravelled on a quest across continents. Believed to be the throne of God himself, the search for the Ark leads us to where many are convinced is its current resting place, Ethiopia.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Hunt for Nazi Treasure
programme.desc: Experts investigate the fate of billions of dollars in gold and artwork that Hitler stole during World War II, and using brand-new discoveries, they might finally locate the whereabouts of the missing Nazi treasure.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Dead Sea Scrolls: New Evidence
programme.desc: Experts investigated the Dead Sea Scrolls, which have been kept top-secret for decades by the Vatican. These could reveal the location of tunnel holding billions of dollars of treasure.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Secret Life of Moses
programme.desc: Special access to cutting-edge archaeological investigations in the Holy Land unearth fresh evidence that reveals new secrets about the life of Moses.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Dark Truths of the Templars
programme.desc: Templar fact and fiction have become blurred by their depictions in book and on film. However, we present a very different picture that challenges head on the orthodox beliefs about an order that angered much of Europe, particularly France.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Lost Treasures of Petra
programme.desc: It is one of the great wonders of the ancient world, but there is little information on who built the magnificent city of Petra in Jordan and why. See what treasure remains buried there and the dark secrets that remain in this mysterious place.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Real Holy Grail
programme.desc: Find out what The Holy Grail could have been, whether it was a cup from the Last Supper or used to cleanse Jesus’ body after the Crucifixion, and see where it could be today.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: The Mastermind
programme.desc: LAPD investigators are on the hunt for a criminal stealing expensive yachts, but what they find instead is a mild mannered man among their own ranks… who's involved in a lot more than just boat theft.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: The Sergeant and the Schoolgirl
programme.desc: When high school senior Michelle Miller joins the Future Soldiers program, she sees it as the first step to realizing her dream of enlisting in the Army. But a forbidden affair with her recruiter risks her career in the Army, and her future itself.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Love of Money
programme.desc: These Deadly Women sacrificed their loved ones to satisfy their 'Love of Money.'

programme.title: Deadly Women: Kiss Then Kill
programme.desc: Deadly women "kiss then kill" when love goes wrong.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Fatal Fixation
programme.desc: Jealousy's a curse but it's never an excuse to kill.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Home Renovation Homicide
programme.desc: An out-of-control home makeover may have led to murder.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Without A Trace
programme.desc: In 1984 ten-year-old Kevin Collins disappears on his way home and the city of San Francisco is galvanized in an effort to find him. With few leads to go on, Kevin's case sheds light on hundreds of other kids who have vanished without a trace in the U.S.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Twisted Desires
programme.desc: Every murder is a tragedy but some are plain barbaric.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Home Renovation Homicide
programme.desc: An out-of-control home makeover may have led to murder.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Murder On Newberry St.
programme.desc: In 1969 race riots in York, PA, claim two lives - an African-American mother of two and a young, white police officer. Their deaths are largely forgotten until 30 years later, when their cold cases are reopened, revealing the city's dark past.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Love of Money
programme.desc: These Deadly Women sacrificed their loved ones to satisfy their 'Love of Money.'

programme.title: The Shadows of Death: The Protector
programme.desc: Doris Bradley moved her family to idyllic small town Spring Valley, Illinois, to escape the violence of Chicago. When her 16-year-old daughter Diamond disappears, she fears the worst, and police uncover secrets that may have cost her her life.

programme.title: The Shadows of Death: The Promise
programme.desc: When mother of three Christine Sheddy vanishes without a trace, police are sure she left of her own volition. But her mother, Lynn, knows Christine would never abandon her children.

programme.title: Disappeared: Lost Angel
programme.desc: 19-year-old Angel Garcia disappears after riding his dirt bike around Hartford CT. Friends say Angel was chased by a mysterious SUV before he disappeared. Months Later, a possible sighting in a convenience store 15 miles from home.

programme.title: Disappeared: Into the Mist
programme.desc: Stephanie Crane, aged 9, walks home from the local bowling alley-but never arrives. Early leads go nowhere. For years authorities don't find her or make an arrest. Now, they hope that advances in evidence testing may finally solve the mystery.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Cali-Doe
programme.desc: When a young girl is found murdered in Caledonia NY, police struggle to identify her. The tragedy leads the town make her one of their own, with the name Cali-Doe.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: To Infinity and Back
programme.desc: When Claire Throssell meets Darren Sykes, she thinks her future husband's overwhelming displays of affection are signs of love. She fails to see that Darren is out to control her, and if he doesn't get his way, the revenge he takes will be terrible.

programme.title: See No Evil: Back to Reality
programme.desc: In Buena Park, California, a suitcase containing a mutilated body is discovered in a dumpster. The victim is identified as Jasmine Fiore, a 28-year-old model who has been reported missing. Police turn to surveillance video, hoping to identify her killer.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Unbrotherly Behavior
programme.desc: David Weedman is everyone's friend in Tell City, Indiana. When he's found dead at home, suspicions of suicide emerge. His family pressures detectives to investigate further and now David's best friends are murder suspects.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: What's Mine is Mine
programme.desc: A couple moves into their dream home on the same street where they've lived for years, only to find themselves engulfed in a wrenching conflict with their neighbour who believes he's the rightful owner of their property.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Rural Madness
programme.desc: Differences over how to enjoy life in a peaceful, rural neighborhood quickly escalate into a feud that comes to a bloody end on the road where it began.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: The War Next Door
programme.desc: A family loves everything about their new home except the mockingbirds that perch and squawk in the backyard lemon tree. Their efforts to scare them off start a feud with their neighbors that spins out of control until one of them lies dead.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Deadly Turn
programme.desc: A couple escapes the hazards of the big city and moves to a country community. But suspicion that their new neighbors are in the drug trade turns into bloody rage with children in caught in the crossfire.

programme.title: American Monster: Staten Island Love Story
programme.desc: When popular teacher Simeonette Mapes-Crupi is found dead in her Staten Island condo, all evidence points to a brutal robbery gone wrong. But as detectives dig deeper, they uncover a wealth of secrets, lies and sins, that leads to the ultimate betrayal.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Deadly Cults
programme.desc: Discover some of America's most infamous cults. Whether its religious fire-and -brimstone, Armageddon, or visitors from outer space, the US has no shortage of like-minded people coming together to get swept up in the fervour.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Pablo Escobar: King of Cocaine
programme.desc: Pablo Escobar was the most feared drug dealer in the world. As head of the infamous Medellin cartel he flooded the USA with cocaine and terrorised the South American nation of Colombia. He met his match in a DEA agent who just wouldn't quit.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got That Tough Girl Look
programme.desc: Juanita Liebman and two friends plan to rob a man at Biketoberfest in FL, but it goes wrong and the three kick him into a coma. Juanita tries to lay low, but her epilepsy requires medical attention. The cops stake out the pharmacy to apprehend her.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got Shot Above a Deli
programme.desc: What was planned as an easy robbery turns into The Carnegie Deli Murders. Sean Salley shoots an actress and her friends above a deli in New York, and flees to New Orleans and then to Miami where he plans to leave the country for good.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got a Lot of Pot
programme.desc: Moving small amounts of pot from Mexico lead to a bustling operation for Steve Lamb. By age 20, Lamb was part of a group of traffickers who made millions. Eluding the police, Lamb moved bails of marijuana across the sea until caught in a sting operation.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got a Bad Temper
programme.desc: In July, 2000 Aurlieas McClarty walks into a store and kills the manager for $200. Despite being a wanted man, McClarty doesn't keep a low profile. All McClarty wants is money, cars, drugs and women, and does anything to get them.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got a Pen Pal
programme.desc: Brenda Wynn is out of prison, and wants a new life. But when a co-worker steels her money, she snaps and hits him with her car. Wynn does all she can to stay out of jail by using fake credit cards and conning men into giving her money.

programme.desc: The aerial Gatling gun has the highest rate of fire of any military machine gun in the world. Host Wil Willis flies in an F16 to see the six thousand round a minute Vulcan rip apart targets and fires the minigun from a helicopter at exploding cars.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: Combat Shotguns
programme.desc: Deadly at close quarters the combat shotgun is a powerful tool of any army. Host Wil Willis fires history's greatest shotguns, from the Blunderbuss to the modern Benelli M4 and Mossburg 590.

programme.title: Combat Tech: ROVs

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Death Ridges of Peleliu

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: SAS vs. Rommel
programme.desc: The SAS launches a daring raid behind enemy lines on a German airfield in the Sahara Desert. If they succeed in destroying Rommel's supply planes, their action could turn the tide of war and allow the British to drive the Germans out of North Africa.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Mediterranean and North Africa
programme.desc: Italy's dictator Benito Mussolini dreamt of recreating the Roman Empire. The Mediterranean would become Italy's lake with a great new colonial empire on its southern shore including British-controlled Egypt and Sudan.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Closing the Ring
programme.desc: By late summer 1944, the Allied forces in north-west Europe were thrusting towards the German border. Paris and Antwerp were liberated, but then supply problems brought the advance to a halt. Meanwhile, Stalin had halted his main thrust towards Berlin.

programme.title: L.A. Riots: As We Watched
programme.desc: The LA riots of 1992 shocked the nation. It was the most deadly civil unrest in American history. Over 3000 fires were set; over 50 people died; nearly a billion dollars in property damage. For six days in 1992, the world watched as LA burned.

programme.title: Chernobyl Disaster: As We Watched
programme.desc: The catastrophic Chernobyl Nuclear Power Plant in the Ukraine created the worst atomic energy accident in world history, endangering the lives of millions of people.

programme.desc: Lucas goes to Huntsville, Alabama to build the lifelong dream pool of a retiring military couple. Lucas designs the largest grotto enclosed spa and widest waterfall of his career. This build also requires a tornado shelter.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Piña Pool-ada
programme.desc: Lucas creates a tropical oasis complete with an island, a large grotto rock and a Tiki-themed cabana.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Living Under the Sea
programme.desc: Pool designer Lucas Congdon must create an outdoor water room in which a mermaid could live. Former clients in love with all things ocean ask Lucas to remodel the tiny pool in their new home that sits just yards away from the Gulf of Mexico.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Rocks of Love
programme.desc: Lucas is tasked with creating a Mediterranean backyard resort with a Caribbean twist for a client's wedding anniversary. The team builds a paradise dream complete with a 30-person infinity edge spa, over 10 fire features, and his first ever outdoor gym!

programme.title: Fixer Upper: Family Favors French Country Fixer
programme.desc: Chip and Joanna Gaines take Isabel and Justin Reed on a tour through three houses in Waco, Texas. Justin is a lawyer and Isabel's a part-time realtor and stay-at-home mom.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Comedy Cupcakes
programme.desc: Four bakers are going to have to bring the funny -- and the tasty -- if they want to be front and centre at a celebrity packed VIP party for Variety magazine's Power of Comedy.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Breeders' Cup
programme.desc: It's the mother of all horse races, as four cupcake bakers vie for the chance to have their cupcakes at the center of the legendary Breeders' Cup World Championships.

programme.title: Chopped: Scoop's On!
programme.desc: It's an ice cream dream come true with an entire 'Chopped' competition devoted to everyone's favourite sweet, cold treat. In the first round, the chefs find some beautiful gourmet scoops in cones, which they must find a way to make work with halibut.

programme.title: Chopped: Pizza Perfect
programme.desc: The chefs learn they will be expected to make a pizza perfect meal.

programme.title: Chopped: Bacon Baskets!
programme.desc: The chefs get some great news before the cooking begins: bacon will be in every basket.

programme.title: Chopped: Chopped, Again!
programme.desc: It's a second chance at victory, for four losing chefs seeking redemption.

programme.title: Chopped: Meatball Madness
programme.desc: The tasty theme for this competition is meatballs. The chefs must learn how to make meatballs in every round.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Seafood

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Guilty Pleasures
programme.desc: Roger Mooking showcases fifteen of the most delightfully decadent dishes from around America. From bacon brownies to chicken fried lobster, they're the type of savory pleasures and sweet sensations that make everyone long for 'cheat day'.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Carolina 'Cue
programme.desc: Roger heads to North and South Carolina to visit a few restaurants to have upheld the long tradition of barbecuing. At Sweatman's in Holly Hill, whole hogs are cooked and chopped into perfection.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Outrageous Ovens
programme.desc: Mark Skudlarek fires his kiln to bake pottery and uses some of the coals for cooking.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Smoke and Steam
programme.desc: Roger is invited to two community gatherings abundant with local foods on the Hawaiian Island of Oahu.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: BBQ Sandwiches
programme.desc: Roger heads to the Barbecue Exchange for two delicious sandwiches - one is called heaven and the other is called hell. They're both packed with pulled pork and bacon. Then it's off to KayJoe's BBQ in Centreville, Tennessee.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Insane Inventions
programme.desc: Roger Mooking says goodbye to the standard grill and celebrates the most elaborate, over-the-top smokers and roasters.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Southern Sizzle and Smoke
programme.desc: At a non-profit organization to support veterans in Georgia, Roger Mooking helps cook a whole mutton and slow-roast veggies for a cookout. At Bob Sykes Bar-B-Q in Bessemer, AL, he loads 250 pounds of salted pork into a 15-foot pit.

programme.title: Good Eats: Tuna, Surprise!
programme.desc: Alton Brown raises the bar on canned tuna beyond the usual casserole or tuna sandwich.

programme.title: Good Eats: Fermentation Nation
programme.desc: Alton thinks outside the bottle by using beer and wine as key ingredients to prepare several tasty dishes.

programme.title: Good Eats: Another Man Food Show: Breakfast
programme.desc: Alton helps an average Joe whip up a classic breakfast of bacon, eggs and coffee.

programme.title: Good Eats: American Classics X: Chicken Parm
programme.desc: Alton Brown makes the argument that Italian food was actually invented in America, and that chicken parmesan is the dish where it all began. Yet, an Italian canned tomato makes it all possible.

programme.desc: Anne and Polly vow to experience the city like locals but end up on a wild ride through the streets of Newtopia. Sprig is offered a spot at Newtopia University.

programme.title: Amphibia: Little Frogtown/ Hopping Mall
programme.desc: Hop Pop investigates the disappearance of an old friend and the shadowy crime syndicate he suspects are behind it. Hop Pop takes the kids to a Newtopian shopping mall to buy souvenirs, and Anne will do anything to get the perfect gift for her mom.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Sleepover to End All Sleepovers/ A Day at the Aquarium
programme.desc: Anne and Marcy issue a Scare Dare challenge that brings Sprig and Polly into forbidden areas of the castle. Anne and the Plantars look to spend what could be their last day together at the Newtopia Aquarium.

programme.title: Amphibia: Cane Crazy / Flood, Sweat & Tears
programme.desc: When Anne breaks Hop Pop's favorite cane, she and her friends set out to replace it; After Anne's bedroom floods she has to share a room with Sprig.

programme.title: Amphibia: Hop Luck / Stakeout
programme.desc: To win a village cooking contest, Anne leads the family on a quest to make pizza; Sprig tricks Anne and Hop Pop into going on a stakeout in order to make them get along.

programme.title: Amphibia: Anne or Beast?/ Best Fronds
programme.desc: Sprig tries to capture a mysterious beast to prove that he's responsible; Sprig takes Anne swimming in a nearby lake to help her feel less homesick.

programme.title: Amphibia: Anne Theft Auto / Breakout Star
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: Amphibia: Sprig vs. Hop Pop / Girl Time
programme.desc: Angry with how the Plantar farm is being run, Sprig decides to overthrow Hop Pop. Anne is going to give Polly some long overdue girl time, whether Polly wants it or not.

programme.title: Amphibia: Dating Season / Anne vs. Wild
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Domino Effect / Taking Charge
programme.desc: Anne wants to keep a caterpillar as a pet, but she'll have to keep it a secret from Hop Pop; After one of the Plantars mysteriously runs out the charge on Anne's phone, the family embarks on a mission to try and recharge it.

programme.title: Amphibia: Contagi-Anne/ Family Shrub
programme.desc: Anne fakes getting sick to get off work, but the rest of the family gets sick. Sprig and Polly think their family history is boring, until they uncover family secrets.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Cheer Up, Candace/ Fireside Girl Jamboree
programme.desc: Candace is down after Jeremy cancels their date/ Candace hopes to join the Fireside Girls.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Bully Code/ Finding Mary McGuffin
programme.desc: Dad accidentally sells Candace's favorite childhood doll, Mary McGuffin, to Dr. Doofenshmirtz. Baljeet asks for Phineas and Ferb's help when Buford starts to drive him nuts.

programme.desc: When Dipper wishes he could go back in time and undo a mistake he made, he discovers there is a time machine that can help him do just that. Meanwhile, it's love at first sight for Mabel when she wins a pet pig at the fair.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Irrational Treasure
programme.desc: When Dipper and Mabel discover evidence that the reported town founder is a hoax, they set out to expose the historical coverup and prove Mabel's silliness is not a bad thing.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Double Dipper
programme.desc: When Stan throws a big weekend party to promote the Mystery Shack, Dipper uses an off-kilter copy machine to make clones of himself so he can impress Wendy. Meanwhile, Mabel stands up for her friends and fights for the Party Queen title in their honour.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Domino Effect / Taking Charge
programme.desc: Anne wants to keep a caterpillar as a pet, but she'll have to keep it a secret from Hop Pop; After one of the Plantars mysteriously runs out the charge on Anne's phone, the family embarks on a mission to try and recharge it.

programme.title: Amphibia: Lily Pad Thai/ Plantar's Last Stand

programme.title: The Verdict With Judge Hatchett: No Debt Mommy / Babysitter Bummer

programme.title: Protection Court: Middle of the Night at Moms/ Tasmanian Devil
programme.desc: Judge Carroll Kelly advocates for the victims of crime by being tough, but fair.

programme.title: Ask Dr. LaViola

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: Ain't Nothing But Bad Dogs/ Unreliable Tech Incident
programme.desc: Dogs damage a car; a dispute over technical difficulties leads to a suit for unpaid wages.

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court: Kennedy vs. Pope
programme.desc: A young New Mexico couple were friends with benefits, and now the man questions the paternity of their three-month-old son and claims she was involved with at least two other men.

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court: Arbogast vs. Vess
programme.desc: A Kansas man claims he's not the father, but his ex-girlfriend accuses him of denying her two-year-old daughter because he's involved with one of her friends.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: Angella is suing her ex Timothy for rental car damages, engine replacement, vandalizing her car's back window and property damage. Timothy says Angela failed to get bumper insurance and he had nothing to do with the car and property damage.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: A woman has a son with the defendant, but claims he was an abusive drug addict who abandoned her and their child; she is suing for child support.

programme.title: The People's Court

programme.title: Judge Jerry

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Update: My Sister's Boyfriend Offered Me $1000 For Sex

programme.title: Maury: I'm 56... Stop This 24-Year-Old From Pinning Her Baby on Me

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Hot Girls Fighting

programme.title: Maury: 30 Years With No Father ... Is This Man Our Dad?
